verses.en: And she conceived again and bore a son, and said: "This time I will thank the LORD." Therefore she called his name Yehudah — "Praise." And she ceased from bearing.

verses.he: וַ/תֵּ֣רֶא רָחֵ֗ל כִּ֣י לֹ֤א יָֽלְדָה֙ לְ/יַעֲקֹ֔ב וַ/תְּקַנֵּ֥א רָחֵ֖ל בַּ/אֲחֹתָ֑/הּ וַ/תֹּ֤אמֶר אֶֽל יַעֲקֹב֙ הָֽבָ/ה לִּ֣/י בָנִ֔ים וְ/אִם אַ֖יִן מֵתָ֥ה אָנֹֽכִי
verses.en: And Rachel saw that she had not borne to Yaakov, and Rachel envied her sister, and said unto Yaakov: "Give me sons, and if not — I am dying."

verses.he: וַ/יִּֽחַר אַ֥ף יַעֲקֹ֖ב בְּ/רָחֵ֑ל וַ/יֹּ֗אמֶר הֲ/תַ֤חַת אֱלֹהִים֙ אָנֹ֔כִי אֲשֶׁר מָנַ֥ע מִמֵּ֖/ךְ פְּרִי בָֽטֶן
verses.en: And Yaakov's anger burned against Rachel, and he said: "Am I in place of God, who has withheld from you fruit of the womb?"

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֕אמֶר הִנֵּ֛ה אֲמָתִ֥/י בִלְהָ֖ה בֹּ֣א אֵלֶ֑י/הָ וְ/תֵלֵד֙ עַל בִּרְכַּ֔/י וְ/אִבָּנֶ֥ה גַם אָנֹכִ֖י מִמֶּֽ/נָּה
verses.en: And she said: "Behold my handmaid Bilhah — come in unto her, and she will bear upon my knees, and I too shall be built up through her."

verses.he: וַ/תִּתֶּן ל֛/וֹ אֶת בִּלְהָ֥ה שִׁפְחָתָ֖/הּ לְ/אִשָּׁ֑ה וַ/יָּבֹ֥א אֵלֶ֖י/הָ יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And she gave him Bilhah her handmaid as wife; and Yaakov came in unto her.

verses.he: וַ/תַּ֣הַר בִּלְהָ֔ה וַ/תֵּ֥לֶד לְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב בֵּֽן
verses.en: And Bilhah conceived and bore Yaakov a son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֤אמֶר רָחֵל֙ דָּנַ֣/נִּי אֱלֹהִ֔ים וְ/גַם֙ שָׁמַ֣ע בְּ/קֹלִ֔/י וַ/יִּתֶּן לִ֖/י בֵּ֑ן עַל כֵּ֛ן קָרְאָ֥ה שְׁמ֖/וֹ דָּֽן
verses.en: And Rachel said: "God has judged me, and has also heard my voice, and has given me a son." Therefore she called his name Dan — "Judgment."

verses.he: וַ/תַּ֣הַר ע֔וֹד וַ/תֵּ֕לֶד בִּלְהָ֖ה שִׁפְחַ֣ת רָחֵ֑ל בֵּ֥ן שֵׁנִ֖י לְ/יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And Bilhah, handmaid of Rachel, conceived again and bore Yaakov a second son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר רָחֵ֗ל נַפְתּוּלֵ֨י אֱלֹהִ֧ים נִפְתַּ֛לְתִּי עִם אֲחֹתִ֖/י גַּם יָכֹ֑לְתִּי וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖/וֹ נַפְתָּלִֽי
verses.en: And Rachel said: "With wrestlings of God I have wrestled with my sister, and I have also prevailed." And she called his name Naphtali — "My Wrestling."

verses.he: וַ/תֵּ֣רֶא לֵאָ֔ה כִּ֥י עָמְדָ֖ה מִ/לֶּ֑דֶת וַ/תִּקַּח֙ אֶת זִלְפָּ֣ה שִׁפְחָתָ֔/הּ וַ/תִּתֵּ֥ן אֹתָ֛/הּ לְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב לְ/אִשָּֽׁה
verses.en: And Leah saw that she had ceased from bearing, and she took Zilpah her handmaid and gave her to Yaakov as wife.

verses.he: וַ/תֵּ֗לֶד זִלְפָּ֛ה שִׁפְחַ֥ת לֵאָ֖ה לְ/יַעֲקֹ֥ב בֵּֽן
verses.en: And Zilpah, handmaid of Leah, bore Yaakov a son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֥אמֶר לֵאָ֖ה ב/גד בָּ֣א גָ֑ד וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א אֶת שְׁמ֖/וֹ גָּֽד
verses.en: And Leah said: "Fortune has come!" And she called his name Gad — "Fortune."

verses.he: וַ/תֵּ֗לֶד זִלְפָּה֙ שִׁפְחַ֣ת לֵאָ֔ה בֵּ֥ן שֵׁנִ֖י לְ/יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And Zilpah, handmaid of Leah, bore Yaakov a second son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר לֵאָ֔ה בְּ/אָשְׁרִ֕/י כִּ֥י אִשְּׁר֖וּ/נִי בָּנ֑וֹת וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א אֶת שְׁמ֖/וֹ אָשֵֽׁר
verses.en: And Leah said: "In my happiness! For the daughters will call me happy." And she called his name Asher — "Happy."

verses.he: וַ/יֵּ֨לֶךְ רְאוּבֵ֜ן בִּ/ימֵ֣י קְצִיר חִטִּ֗ים וַ/יִּמְצָ֤א דֽוּדָאִים֙ בַּ/שָּׂדֶ֔ה וַ/יָּבֵ֣א אֹתָ֔/ם אֶל לֵאָ֖ה אִמּ֑/וֹ וַ/תֹּ֤אמֶר רָחֵל֙ אֶל לֵאָ֔ה תְּנִי נָ֣א לִ֔/י מִ/דּוּדָאֵ֖י בְּנֵֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And Reuven went in the days of the wheat harvest and found love-apples in the field, and brought them unto Leah his mother. And Rachel said unto Leah: "Give me, I pray, from the love-apples of your son."

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר לָ֗/הּ הַ/מְעַט֙ קַחְתֵּ֣/ךְ אֶת אִישִׁ֔/י וְ/לָ/קַ֕חַת גַּ֥ם אֶת דּוּדָאֵ֖י בְּנִ֑/י וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר רָחֵ֗ל לָ/כֵן֙ יִשְׁכַּ֤ב עִמָּ/ךְ֙ הַ/לַּ֔יְלָה תַּ֖חַת דּוּדָאֵ֥י בְנֵֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And she said to her: "Is it a small thing that you have taken my husband? And would you take also the love-apples of my son?" And Rachel said: "Therefore he shall lie with you tonight, in exchange for the love-apples of your son."

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֨א יַעֲקֹ֣ב מִן הַ/שָּׂדֶה֮ בָּ/עֶרֶב֒ וַ/תֵּצֵ֨א לֵאָ֜ה לִ/קְרָאת֗/וֹ וַ/תֹּ֨אמֶר֙ אֵלַ֣/י תָּב֔וֹא כִּ֚י שָׂכֹ֣ר שְׂכַרְתִּ֔י/ךָ בְּ/דוּדָאֵ֖י בְּנִ֑/י וַ/יִּשְׁכַּ֥ב עִמָּ֖/הּ בַּ/לַּ֥יְלָה הֽוּא
verses.en: And Yaakov came from the field in the evening, and Leah went out to meet him and said: "Unto me you shall come in, for I have surely hired you with the love-apples of my son." And he lay with her that night.

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁמַ֥ע אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶל לֵאָ֑ה וַ/תַּ֛הַר וַ/תֵּ֥לֶד לְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב בֵּ֥ן חֲמִישִֽׁי
verses.en: And God hearkened unto Leah, and she conceived and bore Yaakov a fifth son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר לֵאָ֗ה נָתַ֤ן אֱלֹהִים֙ שְׂכָרִ֔/י אֲשֶׁר נָתַ֥תִּי שִׁפְחָתִ֖/י לְ/אִישִׁ֑/י וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖/וֹ יִשָּׂשכָֽר
verses.en: And Leah said: "God has given my wages, because I gave my handmaid to my husband." And she called his name Yissaskhar — "There-Is-Wages."

verses.he: וַ/תַּ֤הַר עוֹד֙ לֵאָ֔ה וַ/תֵּ֥לֶד בֵּן שִׁשִּׁ֖י לְּ/יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And Leah conceived again and bore Yaakov a sixth son.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר לֵאָ֗ה זְבָדַ֨/נִי אֱלֹהִ֥ים אֹתִ/י֮ זֵ֣בֶד טוֹב֒ הַ/פַּ֨עַם֙ יִזְבְּלֵ֣/נִי אִישִׁ֔/י כִּֽי יָלַ֥דְתִּי ל֖/וֹ שִׁשָּׁ֣ה בָנִ֑ים וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א אֶת שְׁמ֖/וֹ זְבֻלֽוּן
verses.en: And Leah said: "God has endowed me with a good endowment. Now my husband will dwell with me, for I have borne him six sons." And she called his name Zevulun — "Dwelling."

verses.he: וְ/אַחַ֖ר יָ֣לְדָה בַּ֑ת וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א אֶת שְׁמָ֖/הּ דִּינָֽה
verses.en: And afterward she bore a daughter, and called her name Dinah — "Judgment."

verses.he: וַ/יִּזְכֹּ֥ר אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת רָחֵ֑ל וַ/יִּשְׁמַ֤ע אֵלֶ֨י/הָ֙ אֱלֹהִ֔ים וַ/יִּפְתַּ֖ח אֶת רַחְמָֽ/הּ
verses.en: And God remembered Rachel, and God hearkened unto her, and He opened her womb.

verses.he: וַ/תַּ֖הַר וַ/תֵּ֣לֶד בֵּ֑ן וַ/תֹּ֕אמֶר אָסַ֥ף אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת חֶרְפָּתִֽ/י
verses.en: And she conceived and bore a son, and said: "God has gathered away my reproach."

verses.he: וַ/תִּקְרָ֧א אֶת שְׁמ֛/וֹ יוֹסֵ֖ף לֵ/אמֹ֑ר יֹסֵ֧ף יְהוָ֛ה לִ֖/י בֵּ֥ן אַחֵֽר
verses.en: And she called his name Yoseph — "May-He-Add" — saying: "May the LORD add to me another son."

verses.he: וַ/יְהִ֕י כַּ/אֲשֶׁ֛ר יָלְדָ֥ה רָחֵ֖ל אֶת יוֹסֵ֑ף וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר יַעֲקֹב֙ אֶל לָבָ֔ן שַׁלְּחֵ֨/נִי֙ וְ/אֵ֣לְכָ֔ה אֶל מְקוֹמִ֖/י וּ/לְ/אַרְצִֽ/י
verses.en: And it was, when Rachel had borne Yoseph, that Yaakov said unto Lavan: "Send me away, and I will go unto my place and to my land.

verses.he: תְּנָ֞/ה אֶת נָשַׁ֣/י וְ/אֶת יְלָדַ֗/י אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָבַ֧דְתִּי אֹֽתְ/ךָ֛ בָּ/הֵ֖ן וְ/אֵלֵ֑כָה כִּ֚י אַתָּ֣ה יָדַ֔עְתָּ אֶת עֲבֹדָתִ֖/י אֲשֶׁ֥ר עֲבַדְתִּֽי/ךָ
verses.en: Give me my wives and my children, for whom I have served you, and I will go; for you know my service with which I have served you."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלָי/ו֙ לָבָ֔ן אִם נָ֛א מָצָ֥אתִי חֵ֖ן בְּ/עֵינֶ֑י/ךָ נִחַ֕שְׁתִּי וַ/יְבָרֲכֵ֥/נִי יְהוָ֖ה בִּ/גְלָלֶֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And Lavan said unto him: "If, I pray, I have found favor in your eyes — I have divined that the LORD has blessed me on your account."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמַ֑ר נָקְבָ֧/ה שְׂכָרְ/ךָ֛ עָלַ֖/י וְ/אֶתֵּֽנָה
verses.en: And he said: "Name your wages upon me, and I will give."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֔י/ו אַתָּ֣ה יָדַ֔עְתָּ אֵ֖ת אֲשֶׁ֣ר עֲבַדְתִּ֑י/ךָ וְ/אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר הָיָ֥ה מִקְנְ/ךָ֖ אִתִּֽ/י
verses.en: And he said unto him: "You know how I have served you, and how your livestock has fared with me.

verses.he: כִּ֡י מְעַט֩ אֲשֶׁר הָיָ֨ה לְ/ךָ֤ לְ/פָנַ/י֙ וַ/יִּפְרֹ֣ץ לָ/רֹ֔ב וַ/יְבָ֧רֶךְ יְהוָ֛ה אֹתְ/ךָ֖ לְ/רַגְלִ֑/י וְ/עַתָּ֗ה מָתַ֛י אֶֽעֱשֶׂ֥ה גַם אָנֹכִ֖י לְ/בֵיתִֽ/י
verses.en: For the little that you had before me has burst forth into abundance, and the LORD has blessed you at my foot. And now, when shall I also provide for my own house?"

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֖אמֶר מָ֣ה אֶתֶּן לָ֑/ךְ וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר יַעֲקֹב֙ לֹא תִתֶּן לִ֣/י מְא֔וּמָה אִם תַּֽעֲשֶׂה לִּ/י֙ הַ/דָּבָ֣ר הַ/זֶּ֔ה אָשׁ֛וּבָה אֶרְעֶ֥ה צֹֽאנְ/ךָ֖ אֶשְׁמֹֽר
verses.en: And he said: "What shall I give you?" And Yaakov said: "You shall give me nothing. If you will do this thing for me, I will return to shepherd your flock, to guard it:

verses.he: אֶֽעֱבֹ֨ר בְּ/כָל צֹֽאנְ/ךָ֜ הַ/יּ֗וֹם הָסֵ֨ר מִ/שָּׁ֜ם כָּל שֶׂ֣ה נָקֹ֣ד וְ/טָל֗וּא וְ/כָל שֶׂה חוּם֙ בַּ/כְּשָׂבִ֔ים וְ/טָל֥וּא וְ/נָקֹ֖ד בָּ/עִזִּ֑ים וְ/הָיָ֖ה שְׂכָרִֽ/י
verses.en: I will pass through all your flock today, removing from there every speckled and spotted sheep, and every dark sheep among the lambs, and the spotted and speckled among the goats — and such shall be my wages."

verses.he: וְ/עָֽנְתָה בִּ֤/י צִדְקָתִ/י֙ בְּ/י֣וֹם מָחָ֔ר כִּֽי תָב֥וֹא עַל שְׂכָרִ֖/י לְ/פָנֶ֑י/ךָ כֹּ֣ל אֲשֶׁר אֵינֶ/נּוּ֩ נָקֹ֨ד וְ/טָל֜וּא בָּֽ/עִזִּ֗ים וְ/חוּם֙ בַּ/כְּשָׂבִ֔ים גָּנ֥וּב ה֖וּא אִתִּֽ/י
verses.en: And my rightness shall answer for me in the day to come, when you come to look upon my wages before your face: every one that is not speckled and spotted among the goats, and dark among the lambs — it is stolen, if it is with me."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר לָבָ֖ן הֵ֑ן ל֖וּ יְהִ֥י כִ/דְבָרֶֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And Lavan said: "Good — let it be according to your word."

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֣סַר בַּ/יּוֹם֩ הַ/ה֨וּא אֶת הַ/תְּיָשִׁ֜ים הָֽ/עֲקֻדִּ֣ים וְ/הַ/טְּלֻאִ֗ים וְ/אֵ֤ת כָּל הָֽ/עִזִּים֙ הַ/נְּקֻדּ֣וֹת וְ/הַ/טְּלֻאֹ֔ת כֹּ֤ל אֲשֶׁר לָבָן֙ בּ֔/וֹ וְ/כָל ח֖וּם בַּ/כְּשָׂבִ֑ים וַ/יִּתֵּ֖ן בְּ/יַד בָּנָֽי/ו
verses.en: And he removed on that day the he-goats that were striped and spotted, and all the she-goats that were speckled and spotted — every one that had white in it — and every dark one among the lambs, and gave them into the hand of his sons.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֗שֶׂם דֶּ֚רֶךְ שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֔ים בֵּינ֖/וֹ וּ/בֵ֣ין יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְ/יַעֲקֹ֗ב רֹעֶ֛ה אֶת צֹ֥אן לָבָ֖ן הַ/נּוֹתָרֹֽת
verses.en: And he set a journey of three days between himself and Yaakov; and Yaakov was shepherding the remaining flock of Lavan.

verses.he: וַ/יִּֽקַּֽח ל֣/וֹ יַעֲקֹ֗ב מַקַּ֥ל לִבְנֶ֛ה לַ֖ח וְ/ל֣וּז וְ/עֶרְמ֑וֹן וַ/יְפַצֵּ֤ל בָּ/הֵן֙ פְּצָל֣וֹת לְבָנ֔וֹת מַחְשֹׂף֙ הַ/לָּבָ֔ן אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל הַ/מַּקְלֽוֹת
verses.en: And Yaakov took for himself rods of fresh poplar, and of almond, and of plane-tree, and peeled in them white stripes, laying bare the white that was upon the rods.

verses.he: וַ/יַּצֵּ֗ג אֶת הַ/מַּקְלוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר פִּצֵּ֔ל בָּ/רֳהָטִ֖ים בְּ/שִֽׁקֲת֣וֹת הַ/מָּ֑יִם אֲשֶׁר֩ תָּבֹ֨אןָ הַ/צֹּ֤אן לִ/שְׁתּוֹת֙ לְ/נֹ֣כַח הַ/צֹּ֔אן וַ/יֵּחַ֖מְנָה בְּ/בֹאָ֥/ן לִ/שְׁתּֽוֹת
verses.en: And he set the rods which he had peeled in the channels, in the watering-troughs where the flock would come to drink — facing the flock — and they would become heated when they came to drink.

verses.he: וַ/יֶּחֱמ֥וּ הַ/צֹּ֖אן אֶל הַ/מַּקְל֑וֹת וַ/תֵּלַ֣דְןָ הַ/צֹּ֔אן עֲקֻדִּ֥ים נְקֻדִּ֖ים וּ/טְלֻאִֽים
verses.en: And the flock became heated before the rods, and the flock bore striped, speckled, and spotted.

verses.he: וְ/הַ/כְּשָׂבִים֮ הִפְרִ֣יד יַעֲקֹב֒ וַ֠/יִּתֵּן פְּנֵ֨י הַ/צֹּ֧אן אֶל עָקֹ֛ד וְ/כָל ח֖וּם בְּ/צֹ֣אן לָבָ֑ן וַ/יָּֽשֶׁת ל֤/וֹ עֲדָרִים֙ לְ/בַדּ֔/וֹ וְ/לֹ֥א שָׁתָ֖/ם עַל צֹ֥אן לָבָֽן
verses.en: And the lambs Yaakov separated, and he set the faces of the flock toward the striped and every dark one in the flock of Lavan; and he set his own droves apart, and did not set them with the flock of Lavan.

verses.he: וְ/הָיָ֗ה בְּ/כָל יַחֵם֮ הַ/צֹּ֣אן הַ/מְקֻשָּׁרוֹת֒ וְ/שָׂ֨ם יַעֲקֹ֧ב אֶת הַ/מַּקְל֛וֹת לְ/עֵינֵ֥י הַ/צֹּ֖אן בָּ/רֳהָטִ֑ים לְ/יַחְמֵ֖/נָּה בַּ/מַּקְלֽוֹת
verses.en: And it was, whenever the stronger of the flock were in heat, that Yaakov would place the rods before the eyes of the flock in the channels, that they might become heated among the rods.

verses.he: וּ/בְ/הַעֲטִ֥יף הַ/צֹּ֖אן לֹ֣א יָשִׂ֑ים וְ/הָיָ֤ה הָ/עֲטֻפִים֙ לְ/לָבָ֔ן וְ/הַ/קְּשֻׁרִ֖ים לְ/יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: But when the flock was feeble, he would not place them; so the feeble ones were Lavan's, and the strong ones Yaakov's.

verses.he: וַ/יִּפְרֹ֥ץ הָ/אִ֖ישׁ מְאֹ֣ד מְאֹ֑ד וַֽ/יְהִי ל/וֹ֙ צֹ֣אן רַבּ֔וֹת וּ/שְׁפָחוֹת֙ וַ/עֲבָדִ֔ים וּ/גְמַלִּ֖ים וַ/חֲמֹרִֽים
verses.en: And the man burst forth exceedingly, exceedingly, and he had many flocks, and handmaids and servants, and camels and donkeys.

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁמַ֗ע אֶת דִּבְרֵ֤י בְנֵֽי לָבָן֙ לֵ/אמֹ֔ר לָקַ֣ח יַעֲקֹ֔ב אֵ֖ת כָּל אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְ/אָבִ֑י/נוּ וּ/מֵ/אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְ/אָבִ֔י/נוּ עָשָׂ֕ה אֵ֥ת כָּל הַ/כָּבֹ֖ד הַ/זֶּֽה
verses.en: And he heard the words of the sons of Lavan, saying: "Yaakov has taken all that belonged to our father, and from that which belonged to our father he has made all this weight."

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֥רְא יַעֲקֹ֖ב אֶת פְּנֵ֣י לָבָ֑ן וְ/הִנֵּ֥ה אֵינֶ֛/נּוּ עִמּ֖/וֹ כִּ/תְמ֥וֹל שִׁלְשֽׁוֹם
verses.en: And Yaakov saw the face of Lavan, and behold — it was not toward him as yesterday and the day before.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר יְהוָה֙ אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֔ב שׁ֛וּב אֶל אֶ֥רֶץ אֲבוֹתֶ֖י/ךָ וּ/לְ/מוֹלַדְתֶּ֑/ךָ וְ/אֶֽהְיֶ֖ה עִמָּֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And the LORD said unto Yaakov: "Return to the land of your fathers and to your birthplace, and I will be with you."

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁלַ֣ח יַעֲקֹ֔ב וַ/יִּקְרָ֖א לְ/רָחֵ֣ל וּ/לְ/לֵאָ֑ה הַ/שָּׂדֶ֖ה אֶל צֹאנֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Yaakov sent and called Rachel and Leah to the field, unto his flock.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר לָ/הֶ֗ן רֹאֶ֤ה אָנֹכִי֙ אֶת פְּנֵ֣י אֲבִי/כֶ֔ן כִּֽי אֵינֶ֥/נּוּ אֵלַ֖/י כִּ/תְמֹ֣ל שִׁלְשֹׁ֑ם וֵֽ/אלֹהֵ֣י אָבִ֔/י הָיָ֖ה עִמָּדִֽ/י
verses.en: And he said to them: "I see the face of your father, that it is not toward me as yesterday and the day before; but the God of my father has been with me.

verses.he: וְ/אַתֵּ֖נָה יְדַעְתֶּ֑ן כִּ֚י בְּ/כָל כֹּחִ֔/י עָבַ֖דְתִּי אֶת אֲבִי/כֶֽן
verses.en: And you know that with all my strength I have served your father.

verses.he: וַ/אֲבִי/כֶן֙ הֵ֣תֶל בִּ֔/י וְ/הֶחֱלִ֥ף אֶת מַשְׂכֻּרְתִּ֖/י עֲשֶׂ֣רֶת מֹנִ֑ים וְ/לֹֽא נְתָנ֣/וֹ אֱלֹהִ֔ים לְ/הָרַ֖ע עִמָּדִֽ/י
verses.en: And your father has mocked me, and changed my wages ten times; but God did not allow him to do me evil.

verses.he: אִם כֹּ֣ה יֹאמַ֗ר נְקֻדִּים֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה שְׂכָרֶ֔/ךָ וְ/יָלְד֥וּ כָל הַ/צֹּ֖אן נְקֻדִּ֑ים וְ/אִם כֹּ֣ה יֹאמַ֗ר עֲקֻדִּים֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה שְׂכָרֶ֔/ךָ וְ/יָלְד֥וּ כָל הַ/צֹּ֖אן עֲקֻדִּֽים
verses.en: If he said thus: 'The speckled shall be your wages' — then all the flock bore speckled. And if he said thus: 'The striped shall be your wages' — then all the flock bore striped.

verses.he: וַ/יַּצֵּ֧ל אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת מִקְנֵ֥ה אֲבִי/כֶ֖ם וַ/יִּתֶּן לִֽ/י
verses.en: And God rescued the livestock of your father, and gave them to me.

verses.he: וַ/יְהִ֗י בְּ/עֵת֙ יַחֵ֣ם הַ/צֹּ֔אן וָ/אֶשָּׂ֥א עֵינַ֛/י וָ/אֵ֖רֶא בַּ/חֲל֑וֹם וְ/הִנֵּ֤ה הָֽ/עַתֻּדִים֙ הָ/עֹלִ֣ים עַל הַ/צֹּ֔אן עֲקֻדִּ֥ים נְקֻדִּ֖ים וּ/בְרֻדִּֽים
verses.en: And it was, at the time the flock was in heat, that I lifted my eyes and saw in a dream — and behold, the he-goats mounting the flock were striped, speckled, and spotted.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלַ֜/י מַלְאַ֧ךְ הָ/אֱלֹהִ֛ים בַּ/חֲל֖וֹם יַֽעֲקֹ֑ב וָ/אֹמַ֖ר הִנֵּֽנִ/י
verses.en: And the messenger of God said unto me in the dream: 'Yaakov!' And I said: 'Here I am.'

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֗אמֶר שָׂא נָ֨א עֵינֶ֤י/ךָ וּ/רְאֵה֙ כָּל הָֽ/עַתֻּדִים֙ הָ/עֹלִ֣ים עַל הַ/צֹּ֔אן עֲקֻדִּ֥ים נְקֻדִּ֖ים וּ/בְרֻדִּ֑ים כִּ֣י רָאִ֔יתִי אֵ֛ת כָּל אֲשֶׁ֥ר לָבָ֖ן עֹ֥שֶׂה לָּֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And he said: 'Lift up, now, your eyes and see — all the he-goats mounting the flock are striped, speckled, and spotted; for I have seen all that Lavan is doing to you.

verses.he: אָנֹכִ֤י הָ/אֵל֙ בֵּֽית אֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר מָשַׁ֤חְתָּ שָּׁם֙ מַצֵּבָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָדַ֥רְתָּ לִּ֛/י שָׁ֖ם נֶ֑דֶר עַתָּ֗ה ק֥וּם צֵא֙ מִן הָ/אָ֣רֶץ הַ/זֹּ֔את וְ/שׁ֖וּב אֶל אֶ֥רֶץ מוֹלַדְתֶּֽ/ךָ
verses.en: I am the God of Beit-El, where you anointed a standing-pillar, where you vowed a vow unto Me. Now arise, go out from this land, and return to the land of your birthplace.'"

verses.he: וַ/תַּ֤עַן רָחֵל֙ וְ/לֵאָ֔ה וַ/תֹּאמַ֖רְנָה ל֑/וֹ הַ/ע֥וֹד לָ֛/נוּ חֵ֥לֶק וְ/נַחֲלָ֖ה בְּ/בֵ֥ית אָבִֽי/נוּ
verses.en: And Rachel and Leah answered and said unto him: "Is there yet for us a portion or an inheritance in the house of our father?

verses.he: הֲ/ל֧וֹא נָכְרִיּ֛וֹת נֶחְשַׁ֥בְנוּ ל֖/וֹ כִּ֣י מְכָרָ֑/נוּ וַ/יֹּ֥אכַל גַּם אָכ֖וֹל אֶת כַּסְפֵּֽ/נוּ
verses.en: Are we not counted by him as strangers? For he has sold us, and has also consumed, yes consumed, our silver.

verses.he: כִּ֣י כָל הָ/עֹ֗שֶׁר אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִצִּ֤יל אֱלֹהִים֙ מֵֽ/אָבִ֔י/נוּ לָ֥/נוּ ה֖וּא וּ/לְ/בָנֵ֑י/נוּ וְ/עַתָּ֗ה כֹּל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר אָמַ֧ר אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֵלֶ֖י/ךָ עֲשֵֽׂה
verses.en: For all the wealth which God has rescued from our father — it is ours and our children's. And now, all that God has said unto you — do."

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖קָם יַעֲקֹ֑ב וַ/יִּשָּׂ֛א אֶת בָּנָ֥י/ו וְ/אֶת נָשָׁ֖י/ו עַל הַ/גְּמַלִּֽים
verses.en: And Yaakov arose and lifted his sons and his wives upon the camels.

verses.he: וַ/יִּנְהַ֣ג אֶת כָּל מִקְנֵ֗/הוּ וְ/אֶת כָּל רְכֻשׁ/וֹ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר רָכָ֔שׁ מִקְנֵה֙ קִנְיָנ֔/וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָכַ֖שׁ בְּ/פַדַּ֣ן אֲרָ֑ם לָ/ב֛וֹא אֶל יִצְחָ֥ק אָבִ֖י/ו אַ֥רְצָ/ה כְּנָֽעַן
verses.en: And he drove all his livestock and all his possessions which he had acquired — the livestock of his getting which he had gotten in Paddan-Aram — to come unto Yitschak his father, to the land of Kenaan.

verses.he: וְ/לָבָ֣ן הָלַ֔ךְ לִ/גְזֹ֖ז אֶת צֹאנ֑/וֹ וַ/תִּגְנֹ֣ב רָחֵ֔ל אֶת הַ/תְּרָפִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לְ/אָבִֽי/הָ
verses.en: And Lavan had gone to shear his flock; and Rachel stole the divination-figures that belonged to her father.

verses.he: וַ/יִּגְנֹ֣ב יַעֲקֹ֔ב אֶת לֵ֥ב לָבָ֖ן הָ/אֲרַמִּ֑י עַל בְּלִי֙ הִגִּ֣יד ל֔/וֹ כִּ֥י בֹרֵ֖חַ הֽוּא
verses.en: And Yaakov stole the heart of Lavan the Aramean, in that he did not tell him that he was fleeing.

verses.he: וַ/יִּבְרַ֥ח הוּא֙ וְ/כָל אֲשֶׁר ל֔/וֹ וַ/יָּ֖קָם וַ/יַּעֲבֹ֣ר אֶת הַ/נָּהָ֑ר וַ/יָּ֥שֶׂם אֶת פָּנָ֖י/ו הַ֥ר הַ/גִּלְעָֽד
verses.en: And he fled — he and all that was his — and he arose and crossed the River, and set his face toward the hill-country of Gilad.

verses.he: וַ/יֻּגַּ֥ד לְ/לָבָ֖ן בַּ/יּ֣וֹם הַ/שְּׁלִישִׁ֑י כִּ֥י בָרַ֖ח יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And it was told to Lavan on the third day that Yaakov had fled.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקַּ֤ח אֶת אֶחָי/ו֙ עִמּ֔/וֹ וַ/יִּרְדֹּ֣ף אַחֲרָ֔י/ו דֶּ֖רֶךְ שִׁבְעַ֣ת יָמִ֑ים וַ/יַּדְבֵּ֥ק אֹת֖/וֹ בְּ/הַ֥ר הַ/גִּלְעָֽד
verses.en: And he took his kinsmen with him, and pursued after him a journey of seven days, and overtook him in the hill-country of Gilad.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֧א אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶל לָבָ֥ן הָ/אֲרַמִּ֖י בַּ/חֲלֹ֣ם הַ/לָּ֑יְלָה וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר ל֗/וֹ הִשָּׁ֧מֶר לְ/ךָ֛ פֶּן תְּדַבֵּ֥ר עִֽם יַעֲקֹ֖ב מִ/טּ֥וֹב עַד רָֽע
verses.en: And God came unto Lavan the Aramean in a dream of the night, and said unto him: "Guard yourself, lest you speak with Yaakov from good to evil."

verses.he: וַ/יַּשֵּׂ֥ג לָבָ֖ן אֶֽת יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְ/יַעֲקֹ֗ב תָּקַ֤ע אֶֽת אָהֳל/וֹ֙ בָּ/הָ֔ר וְ/לָבָ֛ן תָּקַ֥ע אֶת אֶחָ֖י/ו בְּ/הַ֥ר הַ/גִּלְעָֽד
verses.en: And Lavan overtook Yaakov; and Yaakov had pitched his tent in the hill-country, and Lavan pitched with his kinsmen in the hill-country of Gilad.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר לָבָן֙ לְ/יַעֲקֹ֔ב מֶ֣ה עָשִׂ֔יתָ וַ/תִּגְנֹ֖ב אֶת לְבָבִ֑/י וַ/תְּנַהֵג֙ אֶת בְּנֹתַ֔/י כִּ/שְׁבֻי֖וֹת חָֽרֶב
verses.en: And Lavan said unto Yaakov: "What have you done, that you stole my heart, and drove my daughters as captives of the sword?
Why did you hide yourself to flee, and steal from me, and not tell me? I would have sent you away with joy and with songs, with drum and with lyre.
And you did not allow me to kiss my sons and my daughters. Now you have done foolishly.

verses.he: יֶשׁ לְ/אֵ֣ל יָדִ֔/י לַ/עֲשׂ֥וֹת עִמָּ/כֶ֖ם רָ֑ע וֵֽ/אלֹהֵ֨י אֲבִי/כֶ֜ם אֶ֣מֶשׁ אָמַ֧ר אֵלַ֣/י לֵ/אמֹ֗ר הִשָּׁ֧מֶר לְ/ךָ֛ מִ/דַּבֵּ֥ר עִֽם יַעֲקֹ֖ב מִ/טּ֥וֹב עַד רָֽע
verses.en: It is in the power of my hand to do you evil; but the God of your father spoke unto me last night, saying: 'Guard yourself from speaking with Yaakov from good to evil.'

verses.he: וְ/עַתָּה֙ הָלֹ֣ךְ הָלַ֔כְתָּ כִּֽי נִכְסֹ֥ף נִכְסַ֖פְתָּה לְ/בֵ֣ית אָבִ֑י/ךָ לָ֥/מָּה גָנַ֖בְתָּ אֶת אֱלֹהָֽ/י
verses.en: And now — you have gone, yes gone, because you longed, yes longed, for the house of your father — but why did you steal my gods?"

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֥עַן יַעֲקֹ֖ב וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר לְ/לָבָ֑ן כִּ֣י יָרֵ֔אתִי כִּ֣י אָמַ֔רְתִּי פֶּן תִּגְזֹ֥ל אֶת בְּנוֹתֶ֖י/ךָ מֵ/עִמִּֽ/י
verses.en: And Yaakov answered and said unto Lavan: "Because I was afraid, for I said: 'Lest you tear your daughters from me.'

verses.he: עִ֠ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר תִּמְצָ֣א אֶת אֱלֹהֶי/ךָ֮ לֹ֣א יִֽחְיֶה֒ נֶ֣גֶד אַחֵ֧י/נוּ הַֽכֶּר לְ/ךָ֛ מָ֥ה עִמָּדִ֖/י וְ/קַֽח לָ֑/ךְ וְ/לֹֽא יָדַ֣ע יַעֲקֹ֔ב כִּ֥י רָחֵ֖ל גְּנָבָֽתַ/ם
verses.en: With whomever you find your gods — he shall not live. Before our kinsmen, discern for yourself what is with me, and take it for yourself." For Yaakov did not know that Rachel had stolen them.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֨א לָבָ֜ן בְּ/אֹ֥הֶל יַעֲקֹ֣ב וּ/בְ/אֹ֣הֶל לֵאָ֗ה וּ/בְ/אֹ֛הֶל שְׁתֵּ֥י הָ/אֲמָהֹ֖ת וְ/לֹ֣א מָצָ֑א וַ/יֵּצֵא֙ מֵ/אֹ֣הֶל לֵאָ֔ה וַ/יָּבֹ֖א בְּ/אֹ֥הֶל רָחֵֽל
verses.en: And Lavan went into the tent of Yaakov, and into the tent of Leah, and into the tent of the two handmaids, and did not find them. And he went out of the tent of Leah, and came into the tent of Rachel.

verses.he: וְ/רָחֵ֞ל לָקְחָ֣ה אֶת הַ/תְּרָפִ֗ים וַ/תְּשִׂמֵ֛/ם בְּ/כַ֥ר הַ/גָּמָ֖ל וַ/תֵּ֣שֶׁב עֲלֵי/הֶ֑ם וַ/יְמַשֵּׁ֥שׁ לָבָ֛ן אֶת כָּל הָ/אֹ֖הֶל וְ/לֹ֥א מָצָֽא
verses.en: And Rachel had taken the divination-figures and put them in the camel-saddle, and sat upon them. And Lavan felt through the whole tent, and did not find them.

verses.he: וַ/תֹּ֣אמֶר אֶל אָבִ֗י/הָ אַל יִ֨חַר֙ בְּ/עֵינֵ֣י אֲדֹנִ֔/י כִּ֣י ל֤וֹא אוּכַל֙ לָ/ק֣וּם מִ/פָּנֶ֔י/ךָ כִּי דֶ֥רֶךְ נָשִׁ֖ים לִ֑/י וַ/יְחַפֵּ֕שׂ וְ/לֹ֥א מָצָ֖א אֶת הַ/תְּרָפִֽים
verses.en: And she said unto her father: "Let it not burn in the eyes of my lord that I cannot rise before you, for the way of women is upon me." And he searched, and did not find the divination-figures.

verses.he: וַ/יִּ֥חַר לְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב וַ/יָּ֣רֶב בְּ/לָבָ֑ן וַ/יַּ֤עַן יַעֲקֹב֙ וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר לְ/לָבָ֔ן מַה פִּשְׁעִ/י֙ מַ֣ה חַטָּאתִ֔/י כִּ֥י דָלַ֖קְתָּ אַחֲרָֽ/י
verses.en: And Yaakov burned, and contended with Lavan. And Yaakov answered and said unto Lavan: "What is my trespass? What is my missing-of-the-mark, that you have pursued hotly after me?

verses.he: כִּֽי מִשַּׁ֣שְׁתָּ אֶת כָּל כֵּלַ֗/י מַה מָּצָ֨אתָ֙ מִ/כֹּ֣ל כְּלֵי בֵיתֶ֔/ךָ שִׂ֣ים כֹּ֔ה נֶ֥גֶד אַחַ֖/י וְ/אַחֶ֑י/ךָ וְ/יוֹכִ֖יחוּ בֵּ֥ין שְׁנֵֽי/נוּ
verses.en: For you have felt through all my goods — what have you found of all the goods of your house? Set it here, before my kinsmen and your kinsmen, and let them judge between the two of us.

verses.he: זֶה֩ עֶשְׂרִ֨ים שָׁנָ֤ה אָנֹכִי֙ עִמָּ֔/ךְ רְחֵלֶ֥י/ךָ וְ/עִזֶּ֖י/ךָ לֹ֣א שִׁכֵּ֑לוּ וְ/אֵילֵ֥י צֹאנְ/ךָ֖ לֹ֥א אָכָֽלְתִּי
verses.en: These twenty years I have been with you: your ewes and your she-goats have not miscarried, and the rams of your flock I have not eaten.

verses.he: טְרֵפָה֙ לֹא הֵבֵ֣אתִי אֵלֶ֔י/ךָ אָנֹכִ֣י אֲחַטֶּ֔/נָּה מִ/יָּדִ֖/י תְּבַקְשֶׁ֑/נָּה גְּנֻֽבְתִ֣י י֔וֹם וּ/גְנֻֽבְתִ֖י לָֽיְלָה
verses.en: The torn I did not bring unto you — I bore the loss of it; from my hand you would seek it, stolen by day and stolen by night.

verses.he: הָיִ֧יתִי בַ/יּ֛וֹם אֲכָלַ֥/נִי חֹ֖רֶב וְ/קֶ֣רַח בַּ/לָּ֑יְלָה וַ/תִּדַּ֥ד שְׁנָתִ֖/י מֵֽ/עֵינָֽ/י
verses.en: I was thus: by day the drought consumed me, and the frost by night, and my sleep fled from my eyes.

verses.he: זֶה לִּ֞/י עֶשְׂרִ֣ים שָׁנָה֮ בְּ/בֵיתֶ/ךָ֒ עֲבַדְתִּ֜י/ךָ אַרְבַּֽע עֶשְׂרֵ֤ה שָׁנָה֙ בִּ/שְׁתֵּ֣י בְנֹתֶ֔י/ךָ וְ/שֵׁ֥שׁ שָׁנִ֖ים בְּ/צֹאנֶ֑/ךָ וַ/תַּחֲלֵ֥ף אֶת מַשְׂכֻּרְתִּ֖/י עֲשֶׂ֥רֶת מֹנִֽים
verses.en: This is twenty years for me in your house: I served you fourteen years for your two daughters, and six years for your flock, and you changed my wages ten times.

verses.he: לוּלֵ֡י אֱלֹהֵ֣י אָבִ/י֩ אֱלֹהֵ֨י אַבְרָהָ֜ם וּ/פַ֤חַד יִצְחָק֙ הָ֣יָה לִ֔/י כִּ֥י עַתָּ֖ה רֵיקָ֣ם שִׁלַּחְתָּ֑/נִי אֶת עָנְיִ֞/י וְ/אֶת יְגִ֧יעַ כַּפַּ֛/י רָאָ֥ה אֱלֹהִ֖ים וַ/יּ֥וֹכַח אָֽמֶשׁ
verses.en: Were it not that the God of my father — the God of Avraham and the Dread of Yitschak — had been with me, surely now you would have sent me away empty. My affliction and the toil of my palms God has seen, and He rebuked you last night."

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֨עַן לָבָ֜ן וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֗ב הַ/בָּנ֨וֹת בְּנֹתַ֜/י וְ/הַ/בָּנִ֤ים בָּנַ/י֙ וְ/הַ/צֹּ֣אן צֹאנִ֔/י וְ/כֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר אַתָּ֥ה רֹאֶ֖ה לִ/י ה֑וּא וְ/לִ/בְנֹתַ֞/י מָֽה אֶֽעֱשֶׂ֤ה לָ/אֵ֨לֶּה֙ הַ/יּ֔וֹם א֥וֹ לִ/בְנֵי/הֶ֖ן אֲשֶׁ֥ר יָלָֽדוּ
verses.en: And Lavan answered and said unto Yaakov: "The daughters are my daughters, and the sons are my sons, and the flock is my flock, and all that you see — it is mine. And to my daughters — what can I do to these today, or to their sons whom they have borne?

verses.he: וְ/עַתָּ֗ה לְכָ֛/ה נִכְרְתָ֥ה בְרִ֖ית אֲנִ֣י וָ/אָ֑תָּה וְ/הָיָ֥ה לְ/עֵ֖ד בֵּינִ֥/י וּ/בֵינֶֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And now, come, let us cut a cutting-bond, I and you; and let it be a witness between me and you."

verses.he: וַ/יִּקַּ֥ח יַעֲקֹ֖ב אָ֑בֶן וַ/יְרִימֶ֖/הָ מַצֵּבָֽה
verses.en: And Yaakov took a stone, and raised it as a standing-pillar.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר יַעֲקֹ֤ב לְ/אֶחָי/ו֙ לִקְט֣וּ אֲבָנִ֔ים וַ/יִּקְח֥וּ אֲבָנִ֖ים וַ/יַּֽעֲשׂוּ גָ֑ל וַ/יֹּ֥אכְלוּ שָׁ֖ם עַל הַ/גָּֽל
verses.en: And Yaakov said unto his kinsmen: "Gather stones." And they took stones and made a mound; and they ate there upon the mound.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקְרָא ל֣/וֹ לָבָ֔ן יְגַ֖ר שָׂהֲדוּתָ֑א וְ/יַֽעֲקֹ֔ב קָ֥רָא ל֖/וֹ גַּלְעֵֽד
verses.en: And Lavan called it Yegar-Sahaduta — and Yaakov called it Galed.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר לָבָ֔ן הַ/גַּ֨ל הַ/זֶּ֥ה עֵ֛ד בֵּינִ֥/י וּ/בֵינְ/ךָ֖ הַ/יּ֑וֹם עַל כֵּ֥ן קָרָֽא שְׁמ֖/וֹ גַּלְעֵֽד
verses.en: And Lavan said: "This mound is a witness between me and you today." Therefore its name was called Galed — "Mound of Witness" —

verses.he: וְ/הַ/מִּצְפָּה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמַ֔ר יִ֥צֶף יְהוָ֖ה בֵּינִ֣/י וּ/בֵינֶ֑/ךָ כִּ֥י נִסָּתֵ֖ר אִ֥ישׁ מֵ/רֵעֵֽ/הוּ
verses.en: and the Mitspah — "Watchtower" — for he said: "May the LORD watch between me and you, when we are hidden each from his fellow.

verses.he: אִם תְּעַנֶּ֣ה אֶת בְּנֹתַ֗/י וְ/אִם תִּקַּ֤ח נָשִׁים֙ עַל בְּנֹתַ֔/י אֵ֥ין אִ֖ישׁ עִמָּ֑/נוּ רְאֵ֕ה אֱלֹהִ֥ים עֵ֖ד בֵּינִ֥/י וּ/בֵינֶֽ/ךָ
verses.en: If you afflict my daughters, and if you take wives besides my daughters — no man is with us; see, God is witness between me and you."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר לָבָ֖ן לְ/יַעֲקֹ֑ב הִנֵּ֣ה הַ/גַּ֣ל הַ/זֶּ֗ה וְ/הִנֵּה֙ הַ/מַצֵּבָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר יָרִ֖יתִי בֵּינִ֥/י וּ/בֵינֶֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And Lavan said unto Yaakov: "Behold this mound, and behold this standing-pillar, which I have cast between me and you.

verses.he: עֵ֚ד הַ/גַּ֣ל הַ/זֶּ֔ה וְ/עֵדָ֖ה הַ/מַּצֵּבָ֑ה אִם אָ֗נִי לֹֽא אֶֽעֱבֹ֤ר אֵלֶ֨י/ךָ֙ אֶת הַ/גַּ֣ל הַ/זֶּ֔ה וְ/אִם אַ֠תָּה לֹא תַעֲבֹ֨ר אֵלַ֜/י אֶת הַ/גַּ֥ל הַ/זֶּ֛ה וְ/אֶת הַ/מַּצֵּבָ֥ה הַ/זֹּ֖את לְ/רָעָֽה
verses.en: Witness is this mound, and witness is the standing-pillar: I shall not pass over this mound unto you, and you shall not pass over this mound and this standing-pillar unto me, for evil.

verses.he: אֱלֹהֵ֨י אַבְרָהָ֜ם וֵֽ/אלֹהֵ֤י נָחוֹר֙ יִשְׁפְּט֣וּ בֵינֵ֔י/נוּ אֱלֹהֵ֖י אֲבִי/הֶ֑ם וַ/יִּשָּׁבַ֣ע יַעֲקֹ֔ב בְּ/פַ֖חַד אָבִ֥י/ו יִצְחָֽק
verses.en: The God of Avraham and the God of Nachor — the God of their father — shall judge between us." And Yaakov swore by the Dread of his father Yitschak.

verses.he: וַ/יִּזְבַּ֨ח יַעֲקֹ֥ב זֶ֨בַח֙ בָּ/הָ֔ר וַ/יִּקְרָ֥א לְ/אֶחָ֖י/ו לֶ/אֱכָל לָ֑חֶם וַ/יֹּ֣אכְלוּ לֶ֔חֶם וַ/יָּלִ֖ינוּ בָּ/הָֽר
verses.en: And Yaakov slaughtered a slaughter upon the hill-country, and called his kinsmen to eat bread; and they ate bread, and lodged on the hill-country.
And Lavan rose early in the morning, and kissed his sons and his daughters, and blessed them. And Lavan went, and returned unto his place.

verses.he: וַ/יַּשְׁכֵּ֨ם לָבָ֜ן בַּ/בֹּ֗קֶר וַ/יְנַשֵּׁ֧ק לְ/בָנָ֛י/ו וְ/לִ/בְנוֹתָ֖י/ו וַ/יְבָ֣רֶךְ אֶתְ/הֶ֑ם וַ/יֵּ֛לֶךְ וַ/יָּ֥שָׁב לָבָ֖ן לִ/מְקֹמֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Lavan rose early in the morning, and kissed his sons and his daughters, and blessed them; and Lavan went and returned to his place.

verses.he: וְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב הָלַ֣ךְ לְ/דַרְכּ֑/וֹ וַ/יִּפְגְּעוּ ב֖/וֹ מַלְאֲכֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים
verses.en: And Yaakov went on his way, and messengers of God encountered him.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר יַעֲקֹב֙ כַּ/אֲשֶׁ֣ר רָאָ֔/ם מַחֲנֵ֥ה אֱלֹהִ֖ים זֶ֑ה וַ/יִּקְרָ֛א שֵֽׁם הַ/מָּק֥וֹם הַ/ה֖וּא מַֽחֲנָֽיִם
verses.en: And Yaakov said when he saw them: "This is the camp of God!" And he called the name of that place Machanayim.

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁלַ֨ח יַעֲקֹ֤ב מַלְאָכִים֙ לְ/פָנָ֔י/ו אֶל עֵשָׂ֖ו אָחִ֑י/ו אַ֥רְצָ/ה שֵׂעִ֖יר שְׂדֵ֥ה אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: And Yaakov sent messengers before him unto Esav his brother, to the land of Se'ir, the field of Edom.

verses.he: וַ/יְצַ֤ו אֹתָ/ם֙ לֵ/אמֹ֔ר כֹּ֣ה תֹאמְר֔וּ/ן לַֽ/אדֹנִ֖/י לְ/עֵשָׂ֑ו כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ עַבְדְּ/ךָ֣ יַעֲקֹ֔ב עִם לָבָ֣ן גַּ֔רְתִּי וָ/אֵחַ֖ר עַד עָֽתָּה
verses.en: And he commanded them, saying: "Thus shall you say to my lord, to Esav: Thus says your servant Yaakov: I have sojourned with Lavan, and I have lingered until now.

verses.he: וַֽ/יְהִי לִ/י֙ שׁ֣וֹר וַ/חֲמ֔וֹר צֹ֖אן וְ/עֶ֣בֶד וְ/שִׁפְחָ֑ה וָֽ/אֶשְׁלְחָ/ה֙ לְ/הַגִּ֣יד לַֽ/אדֹנִ֔/י לִ/מְצֹא חֵ֖ן בְּ/עֵינֶֽי/ךָ
verses.en: And I have come to have ox and donkey, flock and servant and maidservant; and I have sent to tell my lord, to find favor in your eyes."

verses.he: וַ/יָּשֻׁ֨בוּ֙ הַ/מַּלְאָכִ֔ים אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֖ב לֵ/אמֹ֑ר בָּ֤אנוּ אֶל אָחִ֨י/ךָ֙ אֶל עֵשָׂ֔ו וְ/גַם֙ הֹלֵ֣ךְ לִ/קְרָֽאתְ/ךָ֔ וְ/אַרְבַּע מֵא֥וֹת אִ֖ישׁ עִמּֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And the messengers returned to Yaakov, saying: "We came to your brother, to Esav, and he is also coming to meet you, and four hundred men with him."

verses.he: וַ/יִּירָ֧א יַעֲקֹ֛ב מְאֹ֖ד וַ/יֵּ֣צֶר ל֑/וֹ וַ/יַּ֜חַץ אֶת הָ/עָ֣ם אֲשֶׁר אִתּ֗/וֹ וְ/אֶת הַ/צֹּ֧אן וְ/אֶת הַ/בָּקָ֛ר וְ/הַ/גְּמַלִּ֖ים לִ/שְׁנֵ֥י מַחֲנֽוֹת
verses.en: And Yaakov was greatly afraid, and it was distressing to him; and he divided the people that were with him, and the flock and the cattle and the camels, into two camps.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר אִם יָב֥וֹא עֵשָׂ֛ו אֶל הַ/מַּחֲנֶ֥ה הָ/אַחַ֖ת וְ/הִכָּ֑/הוּ וְ/הָיָ֛ה הַ/מַּחֲנֶ֥ה הַ/נִּשְׁאָ֖ר לִ/פְלֵיטָֽה
verses.en: And he said: "If Esav comes to the one camp and strikes it, then the remaining camp shall be for escape."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמֶר֮ יַעֲקֹב֒ אֱלֹהֵי֙ אָבִ֣/י אַבְרָהָ֔ם וֵ/אלֹהֵ֖י אָבִ֣/י יִצְחָ֑ק יְהוָ֞ה הָ/אֹמֵ֣ר אֵלַ֗/י שׁ֧וּב לְ/אַרְצְ/ךָ֛ וּ/לְ/מוֹלַדְתְּ/ךָ֖ וְ/אֵיטִ֥יבָה עִמָּֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And Yaakov said: "God of my father Avraham, and God of my father Yitschak, O LORD, who said to me: 'Return to your land and to your birthplace, and I will do good with you' —

verses.he: קָטֹ֜נְתִּי מִ/כֹּ֤ל הַ/חֲסָדִים֙ וּ/מִ/כָּל הָ֣/אֱמֶ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֖יתָ אֶת עַבְדֶּ֑/ךָ כִּ֣י בְ/מַקְלִ֗/י עָבַ֨רְתִּי֙ אֶת הַ/יַּרְדֵּ֣ן הַ/זֶּ֔ה וְ/עַתָּ֥ה הָיִ֖יתִי לִ/שְׁנֵ֥י מַחֲנֽוֹת
verses.en: I am too small for all the loyal-kindnesses and for all the faithfulness which You have done for Your servant; for with my staff I crossed over this Yarden, and now I have become two camps.

verses.he: הַצִּילֵ֥/נִי נָ֛א מִ/יַּ֥ד אָחִ֖/י מִ/יַּ֣ד עֵשָׂ֑ו כִּֽי יָרֵ֤א אָנֹכִי֙ אֹת֔/וֹ פֶּן יָב֣וֹא וְ/הִכַּ֔/נִי אֵ֖ם עַל בָּנִֽים
verses.en: Deliver me, I pray, from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esav; for I fear him, lest he come and strike me, mother upon children.

verses.he: וְ/אַתָּ֣ה אָמַ֔רְתָּ הֵיטֵ֥ב אֵיטִ֖יב עִמָּ֑/ךְ וְ/שַׂמְתִּ֤י אֶֽת זַרְעֲ/ךָ֙ כְּ/ח֣וֹל הַ/יָּ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא יִסָּפֵ֖ר מֵ/רֹֽב
verses.en: And You, You said: 'I will do good, yes, do good with you, and I will set your seed like the sand of the sea, which cannot be counted for abundance.'"

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֥לֶן שָׁ֖ם בַּ/לַּ֣יְלָה הַ/ה֑וּא וַ/יִּקַּ֞ח מִן הַ/בָּ֧א בְ/יָד֛/וֹ מִנְחָ֖ה לְ/עֵשָׂ֥ו אָחִֽי/ו
verses.en: And he lodged there that night; and he took from what came into his hand a gift for Esav his brother:

verses.he: עִזִּ֣ים מָאתַ֔יִם וּ/תְיָשִׁ֖ים עֶשְׂרִ֑ים רְחֵלִ֥ים מָאתַ֖יִם וְ/אֵילִ֥ים עֶשְׂרִֽים
verses.en: two hundred she-goats and twenty he-goats, two hundred ewes and twenty rams,

verses.he: גְּמַלִּ֧ים מֵינִיק֛וֹת וּ/בְנֵי/הֶ֖ם שְׁלֹשִׁ֑ים פָּר֤וֹת אַרְבָּעִים֙ וּ/פָרִ֣ים עֲשָׂרָ֔ה אֲתֹנֹ֣ת עֶשְׂרִ֔ים וַ/עְיָרִ֖ם עֲשָׂרָֽה
verses.en: thirty nursing camels and their young, forty cows and ten bulls, twenty she-donkeys and ten foals.

verses.he: וַ/יִּתֵּן֙ בְּ/יַד עֲבָדָ֔י/ו עֵ֥דֶר עֵ֖דֶר לְ/בַדּ֑/וֹ וַ֤/יֹּאמֶר אֶל עֲבָדָי/ו֙ עִבְר֣וּ לְ/פָנַ֔/י וְ/רֶ֣וַח תָּשִׂ֔ימוּ בֵּ֥ין עֵ֖דֶר וּ/בֵ֥ין עֵֽדֶר
verses.en: And he gave them into the hand of his servants, each flock by itself; and he said to his servants: "Cross over before me, and put a space between flock and flock."

verses.he: וַ/יְצַ֥ו אֶת הָ/רִאשׁ֖וֹן לֵ/אמֹ֑ר כִּ֣י יִֽפְגָּשְׁ/ךָ֞ עֵשָׂ֣ו אָחִ֗/י וִ/שְׁאֵֽלְ/ךָ֙ לֵ/אמֹ֔ר לְ/מִי אַ֨תָּה֙ וְ/אָ֣נָה תֵלֵ֔ךְ וּ/לְ/מִ֖י אֵ֥לֶּה לְ/פָנֶֽי/ךָ
verses.en: And he commanded the first, saying: "When Esav my brother meets you, and asks you, saying: 'Whose are you? And where are you going? And whose are these before you?'

verses.he: וְ/אָֽמַרְתָּ֙ לְ/עַבְדְּ/ךָ֣ לְ/יַעֲקֹ֔ב מִנְחָ֥ה הִוא֙ שְׁלוּחָ֔ה לַֽ/אדֹנִ֖/י לְ/עֵשָׂ֑ו וְ/הִנֵּ֥ה גַם ה֖וּא אַחֲרֵֽי/נוּ
verses.en: Then you shall say: 'They belong to your servant Yaakov; it is a gift sent to my lord, to Esav; and behold, he also is behind us.'"

verses.he: וַ/יְצַ֞ו גַּ֣ם אֶת הַ/שֵּׁנִ֗י גַּ֚ם אֶת הַ/שְּׁלִישִׁ֔י גַּ֚ם אֶת כָּל הַ/הֹ֣לְכִ֔ים אַחֲרֵ֥י הָ/עֲדָרִ֖ים לֵ/אמֹ֑ר כַּ/דָּבָ֤ר הַ/זֶּה֙ תְּדַבְּר֣וּ/ן אֶל עֵשָׂ֔ו בְּ/מֹצַאֲ/כֶ֖ם אֹתֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And he commanded also the second, also the third, also all who followed after the flocks, saying: "According to this word shall you speak to Esav when you find him.

verses.he: וַ/אֲמַרְתֶּ֕ם גַּ֗ם הִנֵּ֛ה עַבְדְּ/ךָ֥ יַעֲקֹ֖ב אַחֲרֵ֑י/נוּ כִּֽי אָמַ֞ר אֲכַפְּרָ֣ה פָנָ֗י/ו בַּ/מִּנְחָה֙ הַ/הֹלֶ֣כֶת לְ/פָנָ֔/י וְ/אַחֲרֵי כֵן֙ אֶרְאֶ֣ה פָנָ֔י/ו אוּלַ֖י יִשָּׂ֥א פָנָֽ/י
verses.en: And you shall say: 'Moreover, behold, your servant Yaakov is behind us.'" For he said: "I will cover over his face with the gift that goes before me, and afterward I will see his face; perhaps he will lift up my face."

verses.he: וַ/תַּעֲבֹ֥ר הַ/מִּנְחָ֖ה עַל פָּנָ֑י/ו וְ/ה֛וּא לָ֥ן בַּ/לַּֽיְלָה הַ/ה֖וּא בַּֽ/מַּחֲנֶֽה
verses.en: And the gift crossed over before him; and he lodged that night in the camp.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֣קָם בַּ/לַּ֣יְלָה ה֗וּא וַ/יִּקַּ֞ח אֶת שְׁתֵּ֤י נָשָׁי/ו֙ וְ/אֶת שְׁתֵּ֣י שִׁפְחֹתָ֔י/ו וְ/אֶת אַחַ֥ד עָשָׂ֖ר יְלָדָ֑י/ו וַֽ/יַּעֲבֹ֔ר אֵ֖ת מַעֲבַ֥ר יַבֹּֽק
verses.en: And he rose up that night, and took his two wives and his two maidservants and his eleven children, and crossed over the ford of Yabboq.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקָּחֵ֔/ם וַ/יַּֽעֲבִרֵ֖/ם אֶת הַ/נָּ֑חַל וַֽ/יַּעֲבֵ֖ר אֶת אֲשֶׁר ל/וֹ
verses.en: And he took them and sent them over the stream, and he sent over all that was his.

verses.he: וַ/יִּוָּתֵ֥ר יַעֲקֹ֖ב לְ/בַדּ֑/וֹ וַ/יֵּאָבֵ֥ק אִישׁ֙ עִמּ֔/וֹ עַ֖ד עֲל֥וֹת הַ/שָּֽׁחַר
verses.en: And Yaakov was left alone; and a man wrestled with him until the rising of the dawn.

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֗רְא כִּ֣י לֹ֤א יָכֹל֙ ל֔/וֹ וַ/יִּגַּ֖ע בְּ/כַף יְרֵכ֑/וֹ וַ/תֵּ֨קַע֙ כַּף יֶ֣רֶךְ יַעֲקֹ֔ב בְּ/הֵֽאָבְק֖/וֹ עִמּֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And he saw that he could not prevail against him, and he touched the hollow of his thigh; and the hollow of Yaakov's thigh was wrenched as he wrestled with him.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר שַׁלְּחֵ֔/נִי כִּ֥י עָלָ֖ה הַ/שָּׁ֑חַר וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר֙ לֹ֣א אֲשַֽׁלֵּחֲ/ךָ֔ כִּ֖י אִם בֵּרַכְתָּֽ/נִי
verses.en: And he said: "Let me go, for the dawn has risen." And he said: "I will not let you go unless you have blessed me."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר אֵלָ֖י/ו מַה שְּׁמֶ֑/ךָ וַ/יֹּ֖אמֶר יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And he said to him: "What is your name?" And he said: "Yaakov."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֗אמֶר לֹ֤א יַעֲקֹב֙ יֵאָמֵ֥ר עוֹד֙ שִׁמְ/ךָ֔ כִּ֖י אִם יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּֽי שָׂרִ֧יתָ עִם אֱלֹהִ֛ים וְ/עִם אֲנָשִׁ֖ים וַ/תּוּכָֽל
verses.en: And he said: "Not Yaakov shall your name be said any more, but Yisra'el; for you have struggled with God and with men, and you have prevailed."

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁאַ֣ל יַעֲקֹ֗ב וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר֙ הַגִּֽידָ/ה נָּ֣א שְׁמֶ֔/ךָ וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר לָ֥/מָּה זֶּ֖ה תִּשְׁאַ֣ל לִ/שְׁמִ֑/י וַ/יְבָ֥רֶךְ אֹת֖/וֹ שָֽׁם
verses.en: And Yaakov asked, and said: "Tell me, I pray, your name." And he said: "Why is this that you ask for my name?" And he blessed him there.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקְרָ֧א יַעֲקֹ֛ב שֵׁ֥ם הַ/מָּק֖וֹם פְּנִיאֵ֑ל כִּֽי רָאִ֤יתִי אֱלֹהִים֙ פָּנִ֣ים אֶל פָּנִ֔ים וַ/תִּנָּצֵ֖ל נַפְשִֽׁ/י
verses.en: And Yaakov called the name of the place Peni'el: "For I have seen God face to face, and my breath-of-life has been delivered."

verses.he: וַ/יִּֽזְרַֽח ל֣/וֹ הַ/שֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ כַּ/אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָבַ֖ר אֶת פְּנוּאֵ֑ל וְ/ה֥וּא צֹלֵ֖עַ עַל יְרֵכֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And the sun shone upon him as he crossed over Penu'el, and he was limping upon his thigh.

verses.he: עַל כֵּ֡ן לֹֽא יֹאכְל֨וּ בְנֵֽי יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל אֶת גִּ֣יד הַ/נָּשֶׁ֗ה אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל כַּ֣ף הַ/יָּרֵ֔ךְ עַ֖ד הַ/יּ֣וֹם הַ/זֶּ֑ה כִּ֤י נָגַע֙ בְּ/כַף יֶ֣רֶךְ יַעֲקֹ֔ב בְּ/גִ֖יד הַ/נָּשֶֽׁה
verses.en: Therefore the children of Yisra'el do not eat the sinew of the displaced tendon, which is upon the hollow of the thigh, unto this day; for he touched the hollow of Yaakov's thigh at the sinew of the displaced tendon.

verses.he: וַ/יִּשָּׂ֨א יַעֲקֹ֜ב עֵינָ֗י/ו וַ/יַּרְא֙ וְ/הִנֵּ֣ה עֵשָׂ֣ו בָּ֔א וְ/עִמּ֕/וֹ אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת אִ֑ישׁ וַ/יַּ֣חַץ אֶת הַ/יְלָדִ֗ים עַל לֵאָה֙ וְ/עַל רָחֵ֔ל וְ/עַ֖ל שְׁתֵּ֥י הַ/שְּׁפָחֽוֹת
verses.en: And Yaakov lifted up his eyes and saw, and behold, Esav was coming, and with him four hundred men. And he divided the children upon Le'ah and upon Rachel and upon the two maidservants.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֧שֶׂם אֶת הַ/שְּׁפָח֛וֹת וְ/אֶת יַלְדֵי/הֶ֖ן רִֽאשֹׁנָ֑ה וְ/אֶת לֵאָ֤ה וִֽ/ילָדֶ֨י/הָ֙ אַחֲרֹנִ֔ים וְ/אֶת רָחֵ֥ל וְ/אֶת יוֹסֵ֖ף אַחֲרֹנִֽים
verses.en: And he set the maidservants and their children first, and Le'ah and her children after, and Rachel and Yoseph last.

verses.he: וְ/ה֖וּא עָבַ֣ר לִ/פְנֵי/הֶ֑ם וַ/יִּשְׁתַּ֤חוּ אַ֨רְצָ/ה֙ שֶׁ֣בַע פְּעָמִ֔ים עַד גִּשְׁתּ֖/וֹ עַד אָחִֽי/ו
verses.en: And he himself crossed over before them, and bowed down to the earth seven times, until he drew near to his brother.
And Esav ran to meet him, and embraced him, and fell upon his neck, and kissed him; and they wept.

verses.he: וַ/יִּשָּׂ֣א אֶת עֵינָ֗י/ו וַ/יַּ֤רְא אֶת הַ/נָּשִׁים֙ וְ/אֶת הַ/יְלָדִ֔ים וַ/יֹּ֖אמֶר מִי אֵ֣לֶּה לָּ֑/ךְ וַ/יֹּאמַ֕ר הַ/יְלָדִ֕ים אֲשֶׁר חָנַ֥ן אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת עַבְדֶּֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And he lifted up his eyes and saw the women and the children, and said: "Who are these to you?" And he said: "The children whom God has graciously given your servant."

verses.he: וַ/תִּגַּ֧שְׁןָ הַ/שְּׁפָח֛וֹת הֵ֥נָּה וְ/יַלְדֵי/הֶ֖ן וַ/תִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוֶֽיןָ
verses.en: And the maidservants drew near, they and their children, and bowed down.

verses.he: וַ/תִּגַּ֧שׁ גַּם לֵאָ֛ה וִ/ילָדֶ֖י/הָ וַ/יִּֽשְׁתַּחֲו֑וּ וְ/אַחַ֗ר נִגַּ֥שׁ יוֹסֵ֛ף וְ/רָחֵ֖ל וַ/יִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוֽוּ
verses.en: And Le'ah also drew near with her children, and they bowed down; and afterward Yoseph drew near and Rachel, and they bowed down.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר מִ֥י לְ/ךָ֛ כָּל הַ/מַּחֲנֶ֥ה הַ/זֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר פָּגָ֑שְׁתִּי וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר לִ/מְצֹא חֵ֖ן בְּ/עֵינֵ֥י אֲדֹנִֽ/י
verses.en: And he said: "What to you is all this camp that I met?" And he said: "To find favor in the eyes of my lord."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר עֵשָׂ֖ו יֶשׁ לִ֣/י רָ֑ב אָחִ֕/י יְהִ֥י לְ/ךָ֖ אֲשֶׁר לָֽ/ךְ
verses.en: And Esav said: "I have plenty, my brother; let what is yours be yours."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר יַעֲקֹ֗ב אַל נָא֙ אִם נָ֨א מָצָ֤אתִי חֵן֙ בְּ/עֵינֶ֔י/ךָ וְ/לָקַחְתָּ֥ מִנְחָתִ֖/י מִ/יָּדִ֑/י כִּ֣י עַל כֵּ֞ן רָאִ֣יתִי פָנֶ֗י/ךָ כִּ/רְאֹ֛ת פְּנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִ֖ים וַ/תִּרְצֵֽ/נִי
verses.en: And Yaakov said: "No, I pray you, if I have found favor in your eyes, then take my gift from my hand; for I have seen your face as one sees the face of God, and you have been pleased with me.

verses.he: קַח נָ֤א אֶת בִּרְכָתִ/י֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֻבָ֣את לָ֔/ךְ כִּֽי חַנַּ֥/נִי אֱלֹהִ֖ים וְ/כִ֣י יֶשׁ לִ/י כֹ֑ל וַ/יִּפְצַר בּ֖/וֹ וַ/יִּקָּֽח
verses.en: Take, I pray, my blessing that has been brought to you, for God has been gracious to me, and I have all." And he urged him, and he took it.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֖אמֶר נִסְעָ֣ה וְ/נֵלֵ֑כָה וְ/אֵלְכָ֖ה לְ/נֶגְדֶּֽ/ךָ
verses.en: And he said: "Let us journey and let us go, and I will go alongside you."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֗י/ו אֲדֹנִ֤/י יֹדֵ֨עַ֙ כִּֽי הַ/יְלָדִ֣ים רַכִּ֔ים וְ/הַ/צֹּ֥אן וְ/הַ/בָּקָ֖ר עָל֣וֹת עָלָ֑/י וּ/דְפָקוּ/ם֙ י֣וֹם אֶחָ֔ד וָ/מֵ֖תוּ כָּל הַ/צֹּֽאן
verses.en: And he said to him: "My lord knows that the children are tender, and the flock and the cattle are nursing upon me; and if they drive them hard one day, all the flock will die.

verses.he: יַעֲבָר נָ֥א אֲדֹנִ֖/י לִ/פְנֵ֣י עַבְדּ֑/וֹ וַ/אֲנִ֞י אֶֽתְנָהֲלָ֣ה לְ/אִטִּ֗/י לְ/רֶ֨גֶל הַ/מְּלָאכָ֤ה אֲשֶׁר לְ/פָנַ/י֙ וּ/לְ/רֶ֣גֶל הַ/יְלָדִ֔ים עַ֛ד אֲשֶׁר אָבֹ֥א אֶל אֲדֹנִ֖/י שֵׂעִֽירָ/ה
verses.en: Let my lord, I pray, cross over before his servant, and I will lead on gently, at the pace of the work that is before me, and at the pace of the children, until I come to my lord at Se'ir."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר עֵשָׂ֔ו אַצִּֽיגָה נָּ֣א עִמְּ/ךָ֔ מִן הָ/עָ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר אִתִּ֑/י וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר֙ לָ֣/מָּה זֶּ֔ה אֶמְצָא חֵ֖ן בְּ/עֵינֵ֥י אֲדֹנִֽ/י
verses.en: And Esav said: "Let me station with you some of the people who are with me." And he said: "Why this? Let me find favor in the eyes of my lord."

verses.he: וַ/יָּשָׁב֩ בַּ/יּ֨וֹם הַ/ה֥וּא עֵשָׂ֛ו לְ/דַרְכּ֖/וֹ שֵׂעִֽירָ/ה
verses.en: And Esav returned that day on his way to Se'ir.

verses.he: וְ/יַעֲקֹב֙ נָסַ֣ע סֻכֹּ֔תָ/ה וַ/יִּ֥בֶן ל֖/וֹ בָּ֑יִת וּ/לְ/מִקְנֵ֨/הוּ֙ עָשָׂ֣ה סֻכֹּ֔ת עַל כֵּ֛ן קָרָ֥א שֵׁם הַ/מָּק֖וֹם סֻכּֽוֹת
verses.en: And Yaakov journeyed to Sukkot, and built himself a house, and for his cattle he made shelters; therefore the name of the place was called Sukkot.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹא֩ יַעֲקֹ֨ב שָׁלֵ֜ם עִ֣יר שְׁכֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁר֙ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן בְּ/בֹא֖/וֹ מִ/פַּדַּ֣ן אֲרָ֑ם וַ/יִּ֖חַן אֶת פְּנֵ֥י הָ/עִֽיר
verses.en: And Yaakov came whole to the city of Shekhem, which is in the land of Kena'an, when he came from Paddan Aram; and he encamped before the face of the city.

verses.he: וַ/יִּ֜קֶן אֶת חֶלְקַ֣ת הַ/שָּׂדֶ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר נָֽטָה שָׁם֙ אָהֳל֔/וֹ מִ/יַּ֥ד בְּנֵֽי חֲמ֖וֹר אֲבִ֣י שְׁכֶ֑ם בְּ/מֵאָ֖ה קְשִׂיטָֽה
verses.en: And he acquired the portion of the field where he had pitched his tent, from the hand of the sons of Chamor, father of Shekhem, for a hundred qesitah.

verses.he: וַ/יַּצֶּב שָׁ֖ם מִזְבֵּ֑חַ וַ/יִּ֨קְרָא ל֔/וֹ אֵ֖ל אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל
verses.en: And he set up there an altar, and called it El, God of Yisra'el.

verses.he: וַ/תֵּצֵ֤א דִינָה֙ בַּת לֵאָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר יָלְדָ֖ה לְ/יַעֲקֹ֑ב לִ/רְא֖וֹת בִּ/בְנ֥וֹת הָ/אָֽרֶץ
verses.en: And Dinah, the daughter of Le'ah, whom she had borne to Yaakov, went out to see among the daughters of the land.

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֨רְא אֹתָ֜/הּ שְׁכֶ֧ם בֶּן חֲמ֛וֹר הַֽ/חִוִּ֖י נְשִׂ֣יא הָ/אָ֑רֶץ וַ/יִּקַּ֥ח אֹתָ֛/הּ וַ/יִּשְׁכַּ֥ב אֹתָ֖/הּ וַ/יְעַנֶּֽ/הָ
verses.en: And Shekhem, son of Chamor the Chivvite, prince of the land, saw her; and he took her and lay with her and humbled her.

verses.he: וַ/תִּדְבַּ֣ק נַפְשׁ֔/וֹ בְּ/דִינָ֖ה בַּֽת יַעֲקֹ֑ב וַ/יֶּֽאֱהַב֙ אֶת הַֽ/נַּעֲרָ֔ וַ/יְדַבֵּ֖ר עַל לֵ֥ב הַֽ/נַּעֲרָֽ
verses.en: And his breath-of-life clung to Dinah, daughter of Yaakov; and he loved the young woman, and he spoke upon the heart of the young woman.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁכֶ֔ם אֶל חֲמ֥וֹר אָבִ֖י/ו לֵ/אמֹ֑ר קַֽח לִ֛/י אֶת הַ/יַּלְדָּ֥ה הַ/זֹּ֖את לְ/אִשָּֽׁה
verses.en: And Shekhem said to Chamor his father, saying: "Take for me this girl as a wife."

verses.he: וְ/יַעֲקֹ֣ב שָׁמַ֗ע כִּ֤י טִמֵּא֙ אֶת דִּינָ֣ה בִתּ֔/וֹ וּ/בָנָ֛י/ו הָי֥וּ אֶת מִקְנֵ֖/הוּ בַּ/שָּׂדֶ֑ה וְ/הֶחֱרִ֥שׁ יַעֲקֹ֖ב עַד בֹּאָֽ/ם
verses.en: And Yaakov heard that he had defiled Dinah his daughter; and his sons were with his cattle in the field; and Yaakov held silent until they came.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּצֵ֛א חֲמ֥וֹר אֲבִֽי שְׁכֶ֖ם אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֑ב לְ/דַבֵּ֖ר אִתּֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Chamor, father of Shekhem, went out to Yaakov to speak with him.

verses.he: וּ/בְנֵ֨י יַעֲקֹ֜ב בָּ֤אוּ מִן הַ/שָּׂדֶה֙ כְּ/שָׁמְעָ֔/ם וַ/יִּֽתְעַצְּבוּ֙ הָֽ/אֲנָשִׁ֔ים וַ/יִּ֥חַר לָ/הֶ֖ם מְאֹ֑ד כִּֽי נְבָלָ֞ה עָשָׂ֣ה בְ/יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לִ/שְׁכַּב֙ אֶת בַּֽת יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְ/כֵ֖ן לֹ֥א יֵעָשֶֽׂה
verses.en: And the sons of Yaakov came from the field when they heard; and the men were pained, and it burned greatly in them, for a disgrace had been wrought in Yisra'el, to lie with the daughter of Yaakov — and such a thing ought not be done.

verses.he: וַ/יְדַבֵּ֥ר חֲמ֖וֹר אִתָּ֣/ם לֵ/אמֹ֑ר שְׁכֶ֣ם בְּנִ֗/י חָֽשְׁקָ֤ה נַפְשׁ/וֹ֙ בְּ/בִתְּ/כֶ֔ם תְּנ֨וּ נָ֥א אֹתָ֛/הּ ל֖/וֹ לְ/אִשָּֽׁה
verses.en: And Chamor spoke with them, saying: "Shekhem my son — his breath-of-life longs for your daughter; give her, I pray, to him as a wife.

verses.he: וְ/הִֽתְחַתְּנ֖וּ אֹתָ֑/נוּ בְּנֹֽתֵי/כֶם֙ תִּתְּנוּ לָ֔/נוּ וְ/אֶת בְּנֹתֵ֖י/נוּ תִּקְח֥וּ לָ/כֶֽם
verses.en: And make marriages with us: your daughters give to us, and our daughters take for yourselves.

verses.he: וְ/אִתָּ֖/נוּ תֵּשֵׁ֑בוּ וְ/הָ/אָ֨רֶץ֙ תִּהְיֶ֣ה לִ/פְנֵי/כֶ֔ם שְׁבוּ֙ וּ/סְחָר֔וּ/הָ וְ/הֵֽאָחֲז֖וּ בָּֽ/הּ
verses.en: And with us you shall dwell; and the land shall be before you — dwell and trade in it, and take possession in it."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר שְׁכֶם֙ אֶל אָבִ֣י/ה וְ/אֶל אַחֶ֔י/הָ אֶמְצָא חֵ֖ן בְּ/עֵינֵי/כֶ֑ם וַ/אֲשֶׁ֥ר תֹּאמְר֛וּ אֵלַ֖/י אֶתֵּֽן
verses.en: And Shekhem said to her father and to her brothers: "Let me find favor in your eyes, and whatever you say to me I will give.

verses.he: הַרְבּ֨וּ עָלַ֤/י מְאֹד֙ מֹ֣הַר וּ/מַתָּ֔ן וְ/אֶ֨תְּנָ֔ה כַּ/אֲשֶׁ֥ר תֹּאמְר֖וּ אֵלָ֑/י וּ/תְנוּ לִ֥/י אֶת הַֽ/נַּעֲרָ֖ לְ/אִשָּֽׁה
verses.en: Increase upon me greatly the bride-price and the gift, and I will give as you say to me; but give me the young woman as a wife."

verses.he: וַ/יַּעֲנ֨וּ בְנֵֽי יַעֲקֹ֜ב אֶת שְׁכֶ֨ם וְ/אֶת חֲמ֥וֹר אָבִ֛י/ו בְּ/מִרְמָ֖ה וַ/יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ אֲשֶׁ֣ר טִמֵּ֔א אֵ֖ת דִּינָ֥ה אֲחֹתָֽ/ם
verses.en: And the sons of Yaakov answered Shekhem and Chamor his father with guile, and they spoke — because he had defiled Dinah their sister.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמְר֣וּ אֲלֵי/הֶ֗ם לֹ֤א נוּכַל֙ לַ/עֲשׂוֹת֙ הַ/דָּבָ֣ר הַ/זֶּ֔ה לָ/תֵת֙ אֶת אֲחֹתֵ֔/נוּ לְ/אִ֖ישׁ אֲשֶׁר ל֣/וֹ עָרְלָ֑ה כִּֽי חֶרְפָּ֥ה הִ֖וא לָֽ/נוּ
verses.en: And they said to them: "We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to a man who has a foreskin; for it is a disgrace to us.

verses.he: אַךְ בְּ/זֹ֖את נֵא֣וֹת לָ/כֶ֑ם אִ֚ם תִּהְי֣וּ כָמֹ֔/נוּ לְ/הִמֹּ֥ל לָ/כֶ֖ם כָּל זָכָֽר
verses.en: Only on this condition will we consent to you: if you become like us, for every male of yours to be circumcised.

verses.he: וְ/נָתַ֤נּוּ אֶת בְּנֹתֵ֨י/נוּ֙ לָ/כֶ֔ם וְ/אֶת בְּנֹתֵי/כֶ֖ם נִֽקַּֽח לָ֑/נוּ וְ/יָשַׁ֣בְנוּ אִתְּ/כֶ֔ם וְ/הָיִ֖ינוּ לְ/עַ֥ם אֶחָֽד
verses.en: Then we will give our daughters to you, and your daughters we will take for ourselves, and we will dwell with you, and we will become one people.

verses.he: וְ/אִם לֹ֧א תִשְׁמְע֛וּ אֵלֵ֖י/נוּ לְ/הִמּ֑וֹל וְ/לָקַ֥חְנוּ אֶת בִּתֵּ֖/נוּ וְ/הָלָֽכְנוּ
verses.en: But if you will not listen to us, to be circumcised, then we will take our daughter and we will go."

verses.he: וַ/יִּֽיטְב֥וּ דִבְרֵי/הֶ֖ם בְּ/עֵינֵ֣י חֲמ֑וֹר וּ/בְ/עֵינֵ֖י שְׁכֶ֥ם בֶּן חֲמֽוֹר
verses.en: And their words were good in the eyes of Chamor and in the eyes of Shekhem son of Chamor.

verses.he: וְ/לֹֽא אֵחַ֤ר הַ/נַּ֨עַר֙ לַ/עֲשׂ֣וֹת הַ/דָּבָ֔ר כִּ֥י חָפֵ֖ץ בְּ/בַֽת יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְ/ה֣וּא נִכְבָּ֔ד מִ/כֹּ֖ל בֵּ֥ית אָבִֽי/ו
verses.en: And the young man did not delay to do the thing, for he delighted in the daughter of Yaakov; and he was the most honored of all his father's house.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֥א חֲמ֛וֹר וּ/שְׁכֶ֥ם בְּנ֖/וֹ אֶל שַׁ֣עַר עִירָ֑/ם וַֽ/יְדַבְּר֛וּ אֶל אַנְשֵׁ֥י עִירָ֖/ם לֵ/אמֹֽר
verses.en: And Chamor and Shekhem his son came to the gate of their city, and spoke to the men of their city, saying:

verses.he: הָ/אֲנָשִׁ֨ים הָ/אֵ֜לֶּה שְֽׁלֵמִ֧ים הֵ֣ם אִתָּ֗/נוּ וְ/יֵשְׁב֤וּ בָ/אָ֨רֶץ֙ וְ/יִסְחֲר֣וּ אֹתָ֔/הּ וְ/הָ/אָ֛רֶץ הִנֵּ֥ה רַֽחֲבַת יָדַ֖יִם לִ/פְנֵי/הֶ֑ם אֶת בְּנֹתָ/ם֙ נִקַּֽח לָ֣/נוּ לְ/נָשִׁ֔ים וְ/אֶת בְּנֹתֵ֖י/נוּ נִתֵּ֥ן לָ/הֶֽם
verses.en: "These men are at wholeness with us; let them dwell in the land and trade in it, for the land — behold, it is broad on both sides before them. Their daughters we will take for ourselves as wives, and our daughters we will give to them.

verses.he: אַךְ בְּ֠/זֹאת יֵאֹ֨תוּ לָ֤/נוּ הָ/אֲנָשִׁים֙ לָ/שֶׁ֣בֶת אִתָּ֔/נוּ לִ/הְי֖וֹת לְ/עַ֣ם אֶחָ֑ד בְּ/הִמּ֥וֹל לָ֨/נוּ֙ כָּל זָכָ֔ר כַּ/אֲשֶׁ֖ר הֵ֥ם נִמֹּלִֽים
verses.en: Only on this condition will the men consent to us, to dwell with us, to become one people: for every male of ours to be circumcised, as they are circumcised.

verses.he: מִקְנֵ/הֶ֤ם וְ/קִנְיָנָ/ם֙ וְ/כָל בְּהֶמְתָּ֔/ם הֲ/ל֥וֹא לָ֖/נוּ הֵ֑ם אַ֚ךְ נֵא֣וֹתָה לָ/הֶ֔ם וְ/יֵשְׁב֖וּ אִתָּֽ/נוּ
verses.en: Their livestock and their possessions and all their beasts — are they not ours? Only let us consent to them, and they will dwell with us."

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁמְע֤וּ אֶל חֲמוֹר֙ וְ/אֶל שְׁכֶ֣ם בְּנ֔/וֹ כָּל יֹצְאֵ֖י שַׁ֣עַר עִיר֑/וֹ וַ/יִּמֹּ֨לוּ֙ כָּל זָכָ֔ר כָּל יֹצְאֵ֖י שַׁ֥עַר עִירֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And all who went out of the gate of his city listened to Chamor and to Shekhem his son; and every male was circumcised, all who went out of the gate of his city.

verses.he: וַ/יְהִי֩ בַ/יּ֨וֹם הַ/שְּׁלִישִׁ֜י בִּֽ/הְיוֹתָ֣/ם כֹּֽאֲבִ֗ים וַ/יִּקְח֣וּ שְׁנֵֽי בְנֵי יַ֠עֲקֹב שִׁמְע֨וֹן וְ/לֵוִ֜י אֲחֵ֤י דִינָה֙ אִ֣ישׁ חַרְבּ֔/וֹ וַ/יָּבֹ֥אוּ עַל הָ/עִ֖יר בֶּ֑טַח וַ/יַּֽהַרְג֖וּ כָּל זָכָֽר
verses.en: And it was on the third day, when they were in pain, that two sons of Yaakov — Shim'on and Levi, brothers of Dinah — took each man his sword, and came upon the city in its security, and slew every male.

verses.he: וְ/אֶת חֲמוֹר֙ וְ/אֶת שְׁכֶ֣ם בְּנ֔/וֹ הָרְג֖וּ לְ/פִי חָ֑רֶב וַ/יִּקְח֧וּ אֶת דִּינָ֛ה מִ/בֵּ֥ית שְׁכֶ֖ם וַ/יֵּצֵֽאוּ
verses.en: And Chamor and Shekhem his son they slew by the mouth of the sword; and they took Dinah from the house of Shekhem, and went out.

verses.he: בְּנֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֗ב בָּ֚אוּ עַל הַ֣/חֲלָלִ֔ים וַ/יָּבֹ֖זּוּ הָ/עִ֑יר אֲשֶׁ֥ר טִמְּא֖וּ אֲחוֹתָֽ/ם
verses.en: The sons of Yaakov came upon the slain, and plundered the city, because they had defiled their sister.

verses.he: אֶת צֹאנָ֥/ם וְ/אֶת בְּקָרָ֖/ם וְ/אֶת חֲמֹרֵי/הֶּ֑ם וְ/אֵ֧ת אֲשֶׁר בָּ/עִ֛יר וְ/אֶת אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּ/שָּׂדֶ֖ה לָקָֽחוּ
verses.en: Their flock and their cattle and their donkeys, and that which was in the city and that which was in the field, they took.

verses.he: וְ/אֶת כָּל חֵילָ֤/ם וְ/אֶת כָּל טַפָּ/ם֙ וְ/אֶת נְשֵׁי/הֶ֔ם שָׁב֖וּ וַ/יָּבֹ֑זּוּ וְ/אֵ֖ת כָּל אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּ/בָּֽיִת
verses.en: And all their wealth and all their little ones and their wives they took captive, and plundered all that was in the house.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר יַעֲקֹ֜ב אֶל שִׁמְע֣וֹן וְ/אֶל לֵוִי֮ עֲכַרְתֶּ֣ם אֹתִ/י֒ לְ/הַבְאִישֵׁ֨/נִי֙ בְּ/יֹשֵׁ֣ב הָ/אָ֔רֶץ בַּֽ/כְּנַעֲנִ֖י וּ/בַ/פְּרִזִּ֑י וַ/אֲנִי֙ מְתֵ֣י מִסְפָּ֔ר וְ/נֶאֶסְפ֤וּ עָלַ/י֙ וְ/הִכּ֔וּ/נִי וְ/נִשְׁמַדְתִּ֖י אֲנִ֥י וּ/בֵיתִֽ/י
verses.en: And Yaakov said to Shim'on and to Levi: "You have troubled me, to make me stink among the dwellers of the land, among the Kena'anite and the Perizzite; and I am few in number, and they will gather against me and strike me, and I will be destroyed, I and my house."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמְר֑וּ הַ/כְ/זוֹנָ֕ה יַעֲשֶׂ֖ה אֶת אֲחוֹתֵֽ/נוּ
verses.en: And they said: "Shall he treat our sister as a harlot?"

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֔ב ק֛וּם עֲלֵ֥ה בֵֽית אֵ֖ל וְ/שֶׁב שָׁ֑ם וַ/עֲשֵׂה שָׁ֣ם מִזְבֵּ֔חַ לָ/אֵל֙ הַ/נִּרְאֶ֣ה אֵלֶ֔י/ךָ בְּ/בָרְחֲ/ךָ֔ מִ/פְּנֵ֖י עֵשָׂ֥ו אָחִֽי/ךָ
verses.en: And God said to Yaakov: "Arise, go up to Beit-El and dwell there; and make there an altar to the God who appeared to you in your fleeing from the face of Esav your brother."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר יַעֲקֹב֙ אֶל בֵּית֔/וֹ וְ/אֶ֖ל כָּל אֲשֶׁ֣ר עִמּ֑/וֹ הָסִ֜רוּ אֶת אֱלֹהֵ֤י הַ/נֵּכָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ/תֹכְ/כֶ֔ם וְ/הִֽטַּהֲר֔וּ וְ/הַחֲלִ֖יפוּ שִׂמְלֹתֵי/כֶֽם
verses.en: And Yaakov said to his household and to all who were with him: "Put away the gods of the foreigner that are in your midst, and purify yourselves, and change your garments.

verses.he: וְ/נָק֥וּמָה וְ/נַעֲלֶ֖ה בֵּֽית אֵ֑ל וְ/אֶֽעֱשֶׂה שָּׁ֣ם מִזְבֵּ֗חַ לָ/אֵ֞ל הָ/עֹנֶ֤ה אֹתִ/י֙ בְּ/י֣וֹם צָֽרָתִ֔/י וַ/יְהִי֙ עִמָּדִ֔/י בַּ/דֶּ֖רֶךְ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלָֽכְתִּי
verses.en: And let us arise and go up to Beit-El, and I will make there an altar to the God who answered me in the day of my distress, and who was with me in the way that I went."

verses.he: וַ/יִּתְּנ֣וּ אֶֽל יַעֲקֹ֗ב אֵ֣ת כָּל אֱלֹהֵ֤י הַ/נֵּכָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ/יָדָ֔/ם וְ/אֶת הַ/נְּזָמִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ/אָזְנֵי/הֶ֑ם וַ/יִּטְמֹ֤ן אֹתָ/ם֙ יַעֲקֹ֔ב תַּ֥חַת הָ/אֵלָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עִם שְׁכֶֽם
verses.en: And they gave to Yaakov all the gods of the foreigner that were in their hands, and the rings that were in their ears; and Yaakov hid them under the oak that was near Shekhem.

verses.he: וַ/יִּסָּ֑עוּ וַ/יְהִ֣י חִתַּ֣ת אֱלֹהִ֗ים עַל הֶֽ/עָרִים֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ סְבִיבֹ֣תֵי/הֶ֔ם וְ/לֹ֣א רָֽדְפ֔וּ אַחֲרֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב
verses.en: And they journeyed; and a terror of God was upon the cities that were round about them, and they did not pursue after the sons of Yaakov.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֨א יַעֲקֹ֜ב ל֗וּזָ/ה אֲשֶׁר֙ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן הִ֖וא בֵּֽית אֵ֑ל ה֖וּא וְ/כָל הָ/עָ֥ם אֲשֶׁר עִמּֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Yaakov came to Luz, which is in the land of Kena'an — it is Beit-El — he and all the people who were with him.

verses.he: וַ/יִּ֤בֶן שָׁם֙ מִזְבֵּ֔חַ וַ/יִּקְרָא֙ לַ/מָּק֔וֹם אֵ֖ל בֵּֽית אֵ֑ל כִּ֣י שָׁ֗ם נִגְל֤וּ אֵלָי/ו֙ הָֽ/אֱלֹהִ֔ים בְּ/בָרְח֖/וֹ מִ/פְּנֵ֥י אָחִֽי/ו
verses.en: And he built there an altar, and he called the place El Beit-El; for there God had been revealed to him, in his fleeing from the face of his brother.

verses.he: וַ/תָּ֤מָת דְּבֹרָה֙ מֵינֶ֣קֶת רִבְקָ֔ה וַ/תִּקָּבֵ֛ר מִ/תַּ֥חַת לְ/בֵֽית אֵ֖ל תַּ֣חַת הָֽ/אַלּ֑וֹן וַ/יִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖/וֹ אַלּ֥וֹן בָּכֽוּת
verses.en: And Devorah, the nurse of Rivqah, died, and she was buried below Beit-El, beneath the oak; and its name was called Allon Bakhut — the Oak of Weeping.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים אֶֽל יַעֲקֹב֙ ע֔וֹד בְּ/בֹא֖/וֹ מִ/פַּדַּ֣ן אֲרָ֑ם וַ/יְבָ֖רֶךְ אֹתֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And God appeared to Yaakov again, when he came from Paddan Aram, and He blessed him.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּֽאמֶר ל֥/וֹ אֱלֹהִ֖ים שִׁמְ/ךָ֣ יַעֲקֹ֑ב לֹֽא יִקָּרֵא֩ שִׁמְ/ךָ֨ ע֜וֹד יַעֲקֹ֗ב כִּ֤י אִם יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה שְׁמֶ֔/ךָ וַ/יִּקְרָ֥א אֶת שְׁמ֖/וֹ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל
verses.en: And God said to him: "Your name is Yaakov; your name shall no more be called Yaakov, but Yisra'el shall be your name." And He called his name Yisra'el.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמֶר֩ ל֨/וֹ אֱלֹהִ֜ים אֲנִ֨י אֵ֤ל שַׁדַּי֙ פְּרֵ֣ה וּ/רְבֵ֔ה גּ֛וֹי וּ/קְהַ֥ל גּוֹיִ֖ם יִהְיֶ֣ה מִמֶּ֑/ךָּ וּ/מְלָכִ֖ים מֵ/חֲלָצֶ֥י/ךָ יֵצֵֽאוּ
verses.en: And God said to him: "I am El Shaddai — be fruitful and multiply; a nation and an assembly of nations shall come from you, and kings shall go forth from your loins.

verses.he: וְ/אֶת הָ/אָ֗רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֛תִּי לְ/אַבְרָהָ֥ם וּ/לְ/יִצְחָ֖ק לְ/ךָ֣ אֶתְּנֶ֑/נָּה וּֽ/לְ/זַרְעֲ/ךָ֥ אַחֲרֶ֖י/ךָ אֶתֵּ֥ן אֶת הָ/אָֽרֶץ
verses.en: And the land which I gave to Avraham and to Yitschak — to you I will give it, and to your seed after you I will give the land."

verses.he: וַ/יַּ֥עַל מֵ/עָלָ֖י/ו אֱלֹהִ֑ים בַּ/מָּק֖וֹם אֲשֶׁר דִּבֶּ֥ר אִתּֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And God went up from upon him, in the place where He had spoken with him.

verses.he: וַ/יַּצֵּ֨ב יַעֲקֹ֜ב מַצֵּבָ֗ה בַּ/מָּק֛וֹם אֲשֶׁר דִּבֶּ֥ר אִתּ֖/וֹ מַצֶּ֣בֶת אָ֑בֶן וַ/יַּסֵּ֤ךְ עָלֶ֨י/הָ֙ נֶ֔סֶךְ וַ/יִּצֹ֥ק עָלֶ֖י/הָ שָֽׁמֶן
verses.en: And Yaakov set up a standing-stone in the place where He had spoken with him, a standing-stone of stone; and he poured upon it a drink-offering, and he poured oil upon it.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקְרָ֨א יַעֲקֹ֜ב אֶת שֵׁ֣ם הַ/מָּק֗וֹם אֲשֶׁר֩ דִּבֶּ֨ר אִתּ֥/וֹ שָׁ֛ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים בֵּֽית אֵֽל
verses.en: And Yaakov called the name of the place where God had spoken with him: Beit-El.

verses.he: וַ/יִּסְעוּ֙ מִ/בֵּ֣ית אֵ֔ל וַֽ/יְהִי ע֥וֹד כִּבְרַת הָ/אָ֖רֶץ לָ/ב֣וֹא אֶפְרָ֑תָה וַ/תֵּ֥לֶד רָחֵ֖ל וַ/תְּקַ֥שׁ בְּ/לִדְתָּֽ/הּ
verses.en: And they journeyed from Beit-El; and there was still a stretch of land to come to Efrat; and Rachel gave birth, and her labor was hard.

verses.he: וַ/יְהִ֥י בְ/הַקְשֹׁתָ֖/הּ בְּ/לִדְתָּ֑/הּ וַ/תֹּ֨אמֶר לָ֤/הּ הַ/מְיַלֶּ֨דֶת֙ אַל תִּ֣ירְאִ֔י כִּֽי גַם זֶ֥ה לָ֖/ךְ בֵּֽן
verses.en: And it was, when her labor was at its hardest, that the midwife said to her: "Do not fear, for this one also is a son for you."

verses.he: וַ/יְהִ֞י בְּ/צֵ֤את נַפְשָׁ/הּ֙ כִּ֣י מֵ֔תָה וַ/תִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖/וֹ בֶּן אוֹנִ֑י וְ/אָבִ֖י/ו קָֽרָא ל֥/וֹ בִנְיָמִֽין
verses.en: And it was, as her breath-of-life was departing — for she was dying — that she called his name Ben-Oni, Son of my Sorrow; but his father called him Binyamin, Son of the Right Hand.

verses.he: וַ/תָּ֖מָת רָחֵ֑ל וַ/תִּקָּבֵר֙ בְּ/דֶ֣רֶךְ אֶפְרָ֔תָה הִ֖וא בֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם
verses.en: And Rachel died, and she was buried on the way to Efrat — it is Beit Lechem.

verses.he: וַ/יַּצֵּ֧ב יַעֲקֹ֛ב מַצֵּבָ֖ה עַל קְבֻרָתָ֑/הּ הִ֛וא מַצֶּ֥בֶת קְבֻֽרַת רָחֵ֖ל עַד הַ/יּֽוֹם
verses.en: And Yaakov set up a standing-stone upon her burial-place; it is the standing-stone of the burial-place of Rachel, unto this day.

verses.he: וַ/יִּסַּ֖ע יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַ/יֵּ֣ט אָֽהֳלֹ֔/ה מֵ/הָ֖לְאָה לְ/מִגְדַּל עֵֽדֶר
verses.en: And Yisra'el journeyed, and pitched his tent beyond Migdal Eder.

verses.he: וַ/יְהִ֗י בִּ/שְׁכֹּ֤ן יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בָּ/אָ֣רֶץ הַ/הִ֔וא וַ/יֵּ֣לֶךְ רְאוּבֵ֔ן וַ/יִּשְׁכַּב֙ אֶת בִּלְהָה֙ פִּילֶ֣גֶשׁ אָבִ֔י/ו וַ/יִּשְׁמַ֖ע יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַ/יִּֽהְי֥וּ בְנֵֽי יַעֲקֹ֖ב שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר
verses.en: And it was, when Yisra'el dwelt in that land, that Re'uven went and lay with Bilhah, his father's concubine; and Yisra'el heard. And the sons of Yaakov were twelve:

verses.he: בְּנֵ֣י לֵאָ֔ה בְּכ֥וֹר יַעֲקֹ֖ב רְאוּבֵ֑ן וְ/שִׁמְעוֹן֙ וְ/לֵוִ֣י וִֽ/יהוּדָ֔ה וְ/יִשָּׂשכָ֖ר וּ/זְבוּלֻֽן
verses.en: The sons of Le'ah: Re'uven, the firstborn of Yaakov, and Shim'on, and Levi, and Yehudah, and Yissakhar, and Zevulun.

verses.he: בְּנֵ֣י רָחֵ֔ל יוֹסֵ֖ף וּ/בִנְיָמִֽן
verses.en: The sons of Rachel: Yoseph, and Binyamin.

verses.he: וּ/בְנֵ֤י בִלְהָה֙ שִׁפְחַ֣ת רָחֵ֔ל דָּ֖ן וְ/נַפְתָּלִֽי
verses.en: And the sons of Bilhah, handmaid of Rachel: Dan, and Naftali.

verses.he: וּ/בְנֵ֥י זִלְפָּ֛ה שִׁפְחַ֥ת לֵאָ֖ה גָּ֣ד וְ/אָשֵׁ֑ר אֵ֚לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֥ר יֻלַּד ל֖/וֹ בְּ/פַדַּ֥ן אֲרָֽם
verses.en: And the sons of Zilpah, handmaid of Le'ah: Gad, and Asher. These are the sons of Yaakov, who were born to him in Paddan Aram.

verses.he: וַ/יָּבֹ֤א יַעֲקֹב֙ אֶל יִצְחָ֣ק אָבִ֔י/ו מַמְרֵ֖א קִרְיַ֣ת הָֽאַרְבַּ֑ע הִ֣וא חֶבְר֔וֹן אֲשֶׁר גָּֽר שָׁ֥ם אַבְרָהָ֖ם וְ/יִצְחָֽק
verses.en: And Yaakov came to Yitschak his father, to Mamre, Qiryat ha-Arba — it is Chevron — where Avraham and Yitschak had sojourned.

verses.he: וַ/יִּֽהְי֖וּ יְמֵ֣י יִצְחָ֑ק מְאַ֥ת שָׁנָ֖ה וּ/שְׁמֹנִ֥ים שָׁנָֽה
verses.en: And the days of Yitschak were a hundred years and eighty years.

verses.he: וַ/יִּגְוַ֨ע יִצְחָ֤ק וַ/יָּ֨מָת֙ וַ/יֵּאָ֣סֶף אֶל עַמָּ֔י/ו זָקֵ֖ן וּ/שְׂבַ֣ע יָמִ֑ים וַ/יִּקְבְּר֣וּ אֹת֔/וֹ עֵשָׂ֥ו וְ/יַעֲקֹ֖ב בָּנָֽי/ו
verses.en: And Yitschak breathed his last, and died, and was gathered to his peoples, old and full of days; and Esav and Yaakov his sons buried him.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֛לֶּה תֹּלְד֥וֹת עֵשָׂ֖ו ה֥וּא אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: And these are the begettings of Esav — he is Edom.

verses.he: עֵשָׂ֛ו לָקַ֥ח אֶת נָשָׁ֖י/ו מִ/בְּנ֣וֹת כְּנָ֑עַן אֶת עָדָ֗ה בַּת אֵילוֹן֙ הַֽ/חִתִּ֔י וְ/אֶת אָהֳלִֽיבָמָה֙ בַּת עֲנָ֔ה בַּת צִבְע֖וֹן הַֽ/חִוִּֽי
verses.en: Esav took his wives from the daughters of Kena'an: Adah, daughter of Elon the Chittite; and Oholivamah, daughter of Anah, daughter of Tsiv'on the Chivvite;

verses.he: וְ/אֶת בָּשְׂמַ֥ת בַּת יִשְׁמָעֵ֖אל אֲח֥וֹת נְבָיֽוֹת
verses.en: and Basemat, daughter of Yishma'el, sister of Nevayot.

verses.he: וַ/תֵּ֧לֶד עָדָ֛ה לְ/עֵשָׂ֖ו אֶת אֱלִיפָ֑ז וּ/בָ֣שְׂמַ֔ת יָלְדָ֖ה אֶת רְעוּאֵֽל
verses.en: And Adah bore to Esav Elifaz; and Basemat bore Re'u'el.

verses.he: וְ/אָהֳלִֽיבָמָה֙ יָֽלְדָ֔ה אֶת יעיש יְע֥וּשׁ וְ/אֶת יַעְלָ֖ם וְ/אֶת קֹ֑רַח אֵ֚לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י עֵשָׂ֔ו אֲשֶׁ֥ר יֻלְּדוּ ל֖/וֹ בְּ/אֶ֥רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן
verses.en: And Oholivamah bore Ye'ush and Ya'alam and Qorach. These are the sons of Esav, who were born to him in the land of Kena'an.

verses.he: וַ/יִּקַּ֣ח עֵשָׂ֡ו אֶת נָ֠שָׁי/ו וְ/אֶת בָּנָ֣י/ו וְ/אֶת בְּנֹתָי/ו֮ וְ/אֶת כָּל נַפְשׁ֣וֹת בֵּית/וֹ֒ וְ/אֶת מִקְנֵ֣/הוּ וְ/אֶת כָּל בְּהֶמְתּ֗/וֹ וְ/אֵת֙ כָּל קִנְיָנ֔/וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָכַ֖שׁ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן וַ/יֵּ֣לֶךְ אֶל אֶ֔רֶץ מִ/פְּנֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֥ב אָחִֽי/ו
verses.en: And Esav took his wives and his sons and his daughters, and all the breaths-of-life of his house, and his livestock and all his beasts, and all his possessions which he had acquired in the land of Kena'an; and he went to a land, away from the face of Yaakov his brother.

verses.he: כִּֽי הָיָ֧ה רְכוּשָׁ֛/ם רָ֖ב מִ/שֶּׁ֣בֶת יַחְדָּ֑ו וְ/לֹ֨א יָֽכְלָ֜ה אֶ֤רֶץ מְגֽוּרֵי/הֶם֙ לָ/שֵׂ֣את אֹתָ֔/ם מִ/פְּנֵ֖י מִקְנֵי/הֶֽם
verses.en: For their substance was too great for them to dwell together; and the land of their sojournings could not bear them, because of their livestock.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּ֤שֶׁב עֵשָׂו֙ בְּ/הַ֣ר שֵׂעִ֔יר עֵשָׂ֖ו ה֥וּא אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: And Esav dwelt in the hill-country of Se'ir. Esav — he is Edom.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֛לֶּה תֹּלְד֥וֹת עֵשָׂ֖ו אֲבִ֣י אֱד֑וֹם בְּ/הַ֖ר שֵׂעִֽיר
verses.en: And these are the begettings of Esav, father of Edom, in the hill-country of Se'ir.

verses.he: אֵ֖לֶּה שְׁמ֣וֹת בְּנֵֽי עֵשָׂ֑ו אֱלִיפַ֗ז בֶּן עָדָה֙ אֵ֣שֶׁת עֵשָׂ֔ו רְעוּאֵ֕ל בֶּן בָּשְׂמַ֖ת אֵ֥שֶׁת עֵשָֽׂו
verses.en: These are the names of the sons of Esav: Elifaz, son of Adah, wife of Esav; Re'u'el, son of Basemat, wife of Esav.

verses.he: וַ/יִּהְי֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י אֱלִיפָ֑ז תֵּימָ֣ן אוֹמָ֔ר צְפ֥וֹ וְ/גַעְתָּ֖ם וּ/קְנַֽז
verses.en: And the sons of Elifaz were Teiman, Omar, Tsefo, and Ga'tam, and Qenaz.

verses.he: וְ/תִמְנַ֣ע הָיְתָ֣ה פִילֶ֗גֶשׁ לֶֽ/אֱלִיפַז֙ בֶּן עֵשָׂ֔ו וַ/תֵּ֥לֶד לֶ/אֱלִיפַ֖ז אֶת עֲמָלֵ֑ק אֵ֕לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י עָדָ֖ה אֵ֥שֶׁת עֵשָֽׂו
verses.en: And Timna was a concubine of Elifaz, son of Esav, and she bore to Elifaz Amaleq. These are the sons of Adah, wife of Esav.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֨לֶּה֙ בְּנֵ֣י רְעוּאֵ֔ל נַ֥חַת וָ/זֶ֖רַח שַׁמָּ֣ה וּ/מִזָּ֑ה אֵ֣לֶּ֣ה הָי֔וּ בְּנֵ֥י בָשְׂמַ֖ת אֵ֥שֶׁת עֵשָֽׂו
verses.en: And these are the sons of Re'u'el: Nachat and Zerach, Shammah and Mizzah. These were the sons of Basemat, wife of Esav.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֣לֶּה הָי֗וּ בְּנֵ֨י אָהֳלִיבָמָ֧ה בַת עֲנָ֛ה בַּת צִבְע֖וֹן אֵ֣שֶׁת עֵשָׂ֑ו וַ/תֵּ֣לֶד לְ/עֵשָׂ֔ו אֶת יעיש יְע֥וּשׁ וְ/אֶת יַעְלָ֖ם וְ/אֶת קֹֽרַח
verses.en: And these were the sons of Oholivamah, daughter of Anah, daughter of Tsiv'on, wife of Esav: she bore to Esav Ye'ush and Ya'alam and Qorach.

verses.he: אֵ֖לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֣י בְנֵֽי עֵשָׂ֑ו בְּנֵ֤י אֱלִיפַז֙ בְּכ֣וֹר עֵשָׂ֔ו אַלּ֤וּף תֵּימָן֙ אַלּ֣וּף אוֹמָ֔ר אַלּ֥וּף צְפ֖וֹ אַלּ֥וּף קְנַֽז
verses.en: These are the chieftains of the sons of Esav. The sons of Elifaz, the firstborn of Esav: chieftain Teiman, chieftain Omar, chieftain Tsefo, chieftain Qenaz,

verses.he: אַלּֽוּף קֹ֛רַח אַלּ֥וּף גַּעְתָּ֖ם אַלּ֣וּף עֲמָלֵ֑ק אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֤י אֱלִיפַז֙ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ אֱד֔וֹם אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י עָדָֽה
verses.en: chieftain Qorach, chieftain Ga'tam, chieftain Amaleq. These are the chieftains of Elifaz in the land of Edom. These are the sons of Adah.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֗לֶּה בְּנֵ֤י רְעוּאֵל֙ בֶּן עֵשָׂ֔ו אַלּ֥וּף נַ֨חַת֙ אַלּ֣וּף זֶ֔רַח אַלּ֥וּף שַׁמָּ֖ה אַלּ֣וּף מִזָּ֑ה אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֤י רְעוּאֵל֙ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ אֱד֔וֹם אֵ֕לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י בָשְׂמַ֖ת אֵ֥שֶׁת עֵשָֽׂו
verses.en: And these are the sons of Re'u'el, son of Esav: chieftain Nachat, chieftain Zerach, chieftain Shammah, chieftain Mizzah. These are the chieftains of Re'u'el in the land of Edom. These are the sons of Basemat, wife of Esav.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֗לֶּה בְּנֵ֤י אָהֳלִֽיבָמָה֙ אֵ֣שֶׁת עֵשָׂ֔ו אַלּ֥וּף יְע֛וּשׁ אַלּ֥וּף יַעְלָ֖ם אַלּ֣וּף קֹ֑רַח אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֞י אָֽהֳלִיבָמָ֛ה בַּת עֲנָ֖ה אֵ֥שֶׁת עֵשָֽׂו
verses.en: And these are the sons of Oholivamah, wife of Esav: chieftain Ye'ush, chieftain Ya'alam, chieftain Qorach. These are the chieftains of Oholivamah, daughter of Anah, wife of Esav.

verses.he: אֵ֧לֶּה בְנֵי עֵשָׂ֛ו וְ/אֵ֥לֶּה אַלּוּפֵי/הֶ֖ם ה֥וּא אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: These are the sons of Esav, and these are their chieftains. He is Edom.

verses.he: אֵ֤לֶּה בְנֵֽי שֵׂעִיר֙ הַ/חֹרִ֔י יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָ/אָ֑רֶץ לוֹטָ֥ן וְ/שׁוֹבָ֖ל וְ/צִבְע֥וֹן וַ/עֲנָֽה
verses.en: These are the sons of Se'ir the Chorite, the dwellers of the land: Lotan, and Shoval, and Tsiv'on, and Anah,

verses.he: וְ/דִשׁ֥וֹן וְ/אֵ֖צֶר וְ/דִישָׁ֑ן אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֧י הַ/חֹרִ֛י בְּנֵ֥י שֵׂעִ֖יר בְּ/אֶ֥רֶץ אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: and Dishon, and Etser, and Dishan. These are the chieftains of the Chorite, the sons of Se'ir, in the land of Edom.

verses.he: וַ/יִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵי לוֹטָ֖ן חֹרִ֣י וְ/הֵימָ֑ם וַ/אֲח֥וֹת לוֹטָ֖ן תִּמְנָֽע
verses.en: And the sons of Lotan were Chori and Hemam; and the sister of Lotan was Timna.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֨לֶּה֙ בְּנֵ֣י שׁוֹבָ֔ל עַלְוָ֥ן וּ/מָנַ֖חַת וְ/עֵיבָ֑ל שְׁפ֖וֹ וְ/אוֹנָֽם
verses.en: And these are the sons of Shoval: Alvan and Manachat and Eival, Shefo and Onam.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֥לֶּה בְנֵֽי צִבְע֖וֹן וְ/אַיָּ֣ה וַ/עֲנָ֑ה ה֣וּא עֲנָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר מָצָ֤א אֶת הַ/יֵּמִם֙ בַּ/מִּדְבָּ֔ר בִּ/רְעֹת֥/וֹ אֶת הַ/חֲמֹרִ֖ים לְ/צִבְע֥וֹן אָבִֽי/ו
verses.en: And these are the sons of Tsiv'on: both Ayah and Anah — he is the Anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness, while he pastured the donkeys of Tsiv'on his father.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֥לֶּה בְנֵֽי עֲנָ֖ה דִּשֹׁ֑ן וְ/אָהֳלִיבָמָ֖ה בַּת עֲנָֽה
verses.en: And these are the children of Anah: Dishon, and Oholivamah daughter of Anah.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י דִישָׁ֑ן חֶמְדָּ֥ן וְ/אֶשְׁבָּ֖ן וְ/יִתְרָ֥ן וּ/כְרָֽן
verses.en: And these are the sons of Dishon: Chemdan and Eshban and Yitran and Keran.

verses.he: אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵי אֵ֑צֶר בִּלְהָ֥ן וְ/זַעֲוָ֖ן וַ/עֲקָֽן
verses.en: These are the sons of Etser: Bilhan and Za'avan and Aqan.

verses.he: אֵ֥לֶּה בְנֵֽי דִישָׁ֖ן ע֥וּץ וַ/אֲרָֽן
verses.en: These are the sons of Dishan: Uts and Aran.

verses.he: אֵ֖לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֣י הַ/חֹרִ֑י אַלּ֤וּף לוֹטָן֙ אַלּ֣וּף שׁוֹבָ֔ל אַלּ֥וּף צִבְע֖וֹן אַלּ֥וּף עֲנָֽה
verses.en: These are the chieftains of the Chorite: chieftain Lotan, chieftain Shoval, chieftain Tsiv'on, chieftain Anah,

verses.he: אַלּ֥וּף דִּשֹׁ֛ן אַלּ֥וּף אֵ֖צֶר אַלּ֣וּף דִּישָׁ֑ן אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֧י הַ/חֹרִ֛י לְ/אַלֻּפֵי/הֶ֖ם בְּ/אֶ֥רֶץ שֵׂעִֽיר
verses.en: chieftain Dishon, chieftain Etser, chieftain Dishan. These are the chieftains of the Chorite, by their chieftaincies, in the land of Se'ir.

verses.he: וְ/אֵ֨לֶּה֙ הַ/מְּלָכִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר מָלְכ֖וּ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ אֱד֑וֹם לִ/פְנֵ֥י מְלָךְ מֶ֖לֶךְ לִ/בְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל
verses.en: And these are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom, before any king reigned over the children of Yisra'el.

verses.he: וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ בֶּ/אֱד֔וֹם בֶּ֖לַע בֶּן בְּע֑וֹר וְ/שֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖/וֹ דִּנְהָֽבָה
verses.en: And Bela son of Be'or reigned in Edom; and the name of his city was Dinhavah.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת בָּ֑לַע וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔י/ו יוֹבָ֥ב בֶּן זֶ֖רַח מִ/בָּצְרָֽה
verses.en: And Bela died, and Yovav son of Zerach, from Botsrah, reigned in his stead.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת יוֹבָ֑ב וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔י/ו חֻשָׁ֖ם מֵ/אֶ֥רֶץ הַ/תֵּימָנִֽי
verses.en: And Yovav died, and Chusham, from the land of the Teimanite, reigned in his stead.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת חֻשָׁ֑ם וַ/יִּמְלֹ֨ךְ תַּחְתָּ֜י/ו הֲדַ֣ד בֶּן בְּדַ֗ד הַ/מַּכֶּ֤ה אֶת מִדְיָן֙ בִּ/שְׂדֵ֣ה מוֹאָ֔ב וְ/שֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖/וֹ עֲוִֽית
verses.en: And Chusham died, and Hadad son of Bedad — the one who struck Midyan in the field of Mo'av — reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Avit.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת הֲדָ֑ד וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔י/ו שַׂמְלָ֖ה מִ/מַּשְׂרֵקָֽה
verses.en: And Hadad died, and Samlah from Masreqah reigned in his stead.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת שַׂמְלָ֑ה וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔י/ו שָׁא֖וּל מֵ/רְחֹב֥וֹת הַ/נָּהָֽר
verses.en: And Samlah died, and Sha'ul from Rechovot-on-the-River reigned in his stead.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֖מָת שָׁא֑וּל וַ/יִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔י/ו בַּ֥עַל חָנָ֖ן בֶּן עַכְבּֽוֹר
verses.en: And Sha'ul died, and Ba'al Chanan son of Akhbor reigned in his stead.

verses.he: וַ/יָּמָת֮ בַּ֣עַל חָנָ֣ן בֶּן עַכְבּוֹר֒ וַ/יִּמְלֹ֤ךְ תַּחְתָּי/ו֙ הֲדַ֔ר וְ/שֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖/וֹ פָּ֑עוּ וְ/שֵׁ֨ם אִשְׁתּ֤/וֹ מְהֵֽיטַבְאֵל֙ בַּת מַטְרֵ֔ד בַּ֖ת מֵ֥י זָהָֽב
verses.en: And Ba'al Chanan son of Akhbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Pa'u; and the name of his wife was Meheitav'el, daughter of Matred, daughter of Mei Zahav.

verses.he: וְ֠/אֵלֶּה שְׁמ֞וֹת אַלּוּפֵ֤י עֵשָׂו֙ לְ/מִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֔/ם לִ/מְקֹמֹתָ֖/ם בִּ/שְׁמֹתָ֑/ם אַלּ֥וּף תִּמְנָ֛ע אַלּ֥וּף עַֽלְוָ֖ה אַלּ֥וּף יְתֵֽת
verses.en: And these are the names of the chieftains of Esav, by their families, by their places, by their names: chieftain Timna, chieftain Alvah, chieftain Yetet,

verses.he: אַלּ֧וּף אָהֳלִיבָמָ֛ה אַלּ֥וּף אֵלָ֖ה אַלּ֥וּף פִּינֹֽן
verses.en: chieftain Oholivamah, chieftain Elah, chieftain Pinon,

verses.he: אַלּ֥וּף קְנַ֛ז אַלּ֥וּף תֵּימָ֖ן אַלּ֥וּף מִבְצָֽר
verses.en: chieftain Qenaz, chieftain Teiman, chieftain Mivtsar,

verses.he: אַלּ֥וּף מַגְדִּיאֵ֖ל אַלּ֣וּף עִירָ֑ם אֵ֣לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֣י אֱד֗וֹם לְ/מֹֽשְׁבֹתָ/ם֙ בְּ/אֶ֣רֶץ אֲחֻזָּתָ֔/ם ה֥וּא עֵשָׂ֖ו אֲבִ֥י אֱדֽוֹם
verses.en: chieftain Magdi'el, chieftain Iram. These are the chieftains of Edom, by their dwelling-places, in the land of their possession. He is Esav, father of Edom.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּ֣שֶׁב יַעֲקֹ֔ב בְּ/אֶ֖רֶץ מְגוּרֵ֣י אָבִ֑י/ו בְּ/אֶ֖רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן
verses.en: And Yaakov dwelt in the land of his father's sojournings, in the land of Kena'an.

verses.he: אֵ֣לֶּה תֹּלְד֣וֹת יַעֲקֹ֗ב יוֹסֵ֞ף בֶּן שְׁבַֽע עֶשְׂרֵ֤ה שָׁנָה֙ הָיָ֨ה רֹעֶ֤ה אֶת אֶחָי/ו֙ בַּ/צֹּ֔אן וְ/ה֣וּא נַ֗עַר אֶת בְּנֵ֥י בִלְהָ֛ה וְ/אֶת בְּנֵ֥י זִלְפָּ֖ה נְשֵׁ֣י אָבִ֑י/ו וַ/יָּבֵ֥א יוֹסֵ֛ף אֶת דִּבָּתָ֥/ם רָעָ֖ה אֶל אֲבִי/הֶֽם
verses.en: These are the begettings of Yaakov. Yoseph, being seventeen years old, was shepherding with his brothers among the flock; and he was a lad among the sons of Bilhah and among the sons of Zilpah, his father's wives; and Yoseph brought their evil report to their father.

verses.he: וְ/יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אָהַ֤ב אֶת יוֹסֵף֙ מִ/כָּל בָּנָ֔י/ו כִּֽי בֶן זְקֻנִ֥ים ה֖וּא ל֑/וֹ וְ/עָ֥שָׂה ל֖/וֹ כְּתֹ֥נֶת פַּסִּֽים
verses.en: And Yisra'el loved Yoseph more than all his sons, for he was a son of his old age; and he made for him a tunic of extremities.

verses.he: וַ/יִּרְא֣וּ אֶחָ֗י/ו כִּֽי אֹת֞/וֹ אָהַ֤ב אֲבִי/הֶם֙ מִ/כָּל אֶחָ֔י/ו וַֽ/יִּשְׂנְא֖וּ אֹת֑/וֹ וְ/לֹ֥א יָכְל֖וּ דַּבְּר֥/וֹ לְ/שָׁלֹֽם
verses.en: And his brothers saw that their father loved him more than all his brothers, and they hated him; and they could not speak to him in wholeness.

verses.he: וַ/יַּחֲלֹ֤ם יוֹסֵף֙ חֲל֔וֹם וַ/יַּגֵּ֖ד לְ/אֶחָ֑י/ו וַ/יּוֹסִ֥פוּ ע֖וֹד שְׂנֹ֥א אֹתֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Yoseph dreamed a dream, and he told it to his brothers; and they added still more to their hatred of him.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֖אמֶר אֲלֵי/הֶ֑ם שִׁמְעוּ נָ֕א הַ/חֲל֥וֹם הַ/זֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָלָֽמְתִּי
verses.en: And he said to them: "Hear, I pray, this dream that I have dreamed:

verses.he: וְ֠/הִנֵּה אֲנַ֜חְנוּ מְאַלְּמִ֤ים אֲלֻמִּים֙ בְּ/ת֣וֹךְ הַ/שָּׂדֶ֔ה וְ/הִנֵּ֛ה קָ֥מָה אֲלֻמָּתִ֖/י וְ/גַם נִצָּ֑בָה וְ/הִנֵּ֤ה תְסֻבֶּ֨ינָה֙ אֲלֻמֹּ֣תֵי/כֶ֔ם וַ/תִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֖יןָ לַ/אֲלֻמָּתִֽ/י
verses.en: And behold, we were binding sheaves in the midst of the field; and behold, my sheaf arose and also stood upright; and behold, your sheaves gathered round and bowed down to my sheaf."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמְרוּ ל/וֹ֙ אֶחָ֔י/ו הֲ/מָלֹ֤ךְ תִּמְלֹךְ֙ עָלֵ֔י/נוּ אִם מָשׁ֥וֹל תִּמְשֹׁ֖ל בָּ֑/נוּ וַ/יּוֹסִ֤פוּ עוֹד֙ שְׂנֹ֣א אֹת֔/וֹ עַל חֲלֹמֹתָ֖י/ו וְ/עַל דְּבָרָֽי/ו
verses.en: And his brothers said to him: "Will you reign, yes, reign over us? Or will you rule, yes, rule over us?" And they added still more to their hatred of him, on account of his dreams and on account of his words.

verses.he: וַ/יַּחֲלֹ֥ם עוֹד֙ חֲל֣וֹם אַחֵ֔ר וַ/יְסַפֵּ֥ר אֹת֖/וֹ לְ/אֶחָ֑י/ו וַ/יֹּ֗אמֶר הִנֵּ֨ה חָלַ֤מְתִּֽי חֲלוֹם֙ ע֔וֹד וְ/הִנֵּ֧ה הַ/שֶּׁ֣מֶשׁ וְ/הַ/יָּרֵ֗חַ וְ/אַחַ֤ד עָשָׂר֙ כּֽוֹכָבִ֔ים מִֽשְׁתַּחֲוִ֖ים לִֽ/י
verses.en: And he dreamed yet another dream, and recounted it to his brothers, and said: "Behold, I have dreamed yet a dream; and behold, the sun and the moon and eleven stars were bowing down to me."

verses.he: וַ/יְסַפֵּ֣ר אֶל אָבִי/ו֮ וְ/אֶל אֶחָי/ו֒ וַ/יִּגְעַר בּ֣/וֹ אָבִ֔י/ו וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר ל֔/וֹ מָ֛ה הַ/חֲל֥וֹם הַ/זֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָלָ֑מְתָּ הֲ/ב֣וֹא נָב֗וֹא אֲנִי֙ וְ/אִמְּ/ךָ֣ וְ/אַחֶ֔י/ךָ לְ/הִשְׁתַּחֲוֺ֥ת לְ/ךָ֖ אָֽרְצָ/ה
verses.en: And he recounted it to his father and to his brothers; and his father rebuked him, and said to him: "What is this dream that you have dreamed? Shall I and your mother and your brothers indeed come to bow down to you, to the earth?"

verses.he: וַ/יְקַנְאוּ ב֖/וֹ אֶחָ֑י/ו וְ/אָבִ֖י/ו שָׁמַ֥ר אֶת הַ/דָּבָֽר
verses.en: And his brothers were jealous of him; but his father guarded the matter.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּלְכ֖וּ אֶחָ֑י/ו לִ/רְע֛וֹת אֶׄתׄ צֹ֥אן אֲבִי/הֶ֖ם בִּ/שְׁכֶֽם
verses.en: And his brothers went to shepherd the flock of their father at Shekhem.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל אֶל יוֹסֵ֗ף הֲ/ל֤וֹא אַחֶ֨י/ךָ֙ רֹעִ֣ים בִּ/שְׁכֶ֔ם לְכָ֖/ה וְ/אֶשְׁלָחֲ/ךָ֣ אֲלֵי/הֶ֑ם וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר ל֖/וֹ הִנֵּֽ/נִי
verses.en: And Yisra'el said to Yoseph: "Are not your brothers shepherding at Shekhem? Come, and I will send you to them." And he said to him: "Here am I."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֣אמֶר ל֗/וֹ לֶךְ נָ֨א רְאֵ֜ה אֶת שְׁל֤וֹם אַחֶ֨י/ךָ֙ וְ/אֶת שְׁל֣וֹם הַ/צֹּ֔אן וַ/הֲשִׁבֵ֖/נִי דָּבָ֑ר וַ/יִּשְׁלָחֵ֨/הוּ֙ מֵ/עֵ֣מֶק חֶבְר֔וֹן וַ/יָּבֹ֖א שְׁכֶֽמָ/ה
verses.en: And he said to him: "Go, I pray, see the wholeness of your brothers and the wholeness of the flock, and bring me back word." And he sent him from the valley of Chevron, and he came to Shekhem.

verses.he: וַ/יִּמְצָאֵ֣/הוּ אִ֔ישׁ וְ/הִנֵּ֥ה תֹעֶ֖ה בַּ/שָּׂדֶ֑ה וַ/יִּשְׁאָלֵ֧/הוּ הָ/אִ֛ישׁ לֵ/אמֹ֖ר מַה תְּבַקֵּֽשׁ
verses.en: And a man found him, and behold, he was wandering in the field; and the man asked him, saying: "What do you seek?"

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר אֶת אַחַ֖/י אָנֹכִ֣י מְבַקֵּ֑שׁ הַגִּֽידָ/ה נָּ֣א לִ֔/י אֵיפֹ֖ה הֵ֥ם רֹעִֽים
verses.en: And he said: "My brothers I am seeking; tell me, I pray, where they are shepherding."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֤אמֶר הָ/אִישׁ֙ נָסְע֣וּ מִ/זֶּ֔ה כִּ֤י שָׁמַ֨עְתִּי֙ אֹֽמְרִ֔ים נֵלְכָ֖ה דֹּתָ֑יְנָ/ה וַ/יֵּ֤לֶךְ יוֹסֵף֙ אַחַ֣ר אֶחָ֔י/ו וַ/יִּמְצָאֵ֖/ם בְּ/דֹתָֽן
verses.en: And the man said: "They have journeyed from here, for I heard them say: 'Let us go to Dotan.'" And Yoseph went after his brothers, and found them at Dotan.

verses.he: וַ/יִּרְא֥וּ אֹת֖/וֹ מֵ/רָחֹ֑ק וּ/בְ/טֶ֨רֶם֙ יִקְרַ֣ב אֲלֵי/הֶ֔ם וַ/יִּֽתְנַכְּל֥וּ אֹת֖/וֹ לַ/הֲמִיתֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And they saw him from afar; and before he drew near to them, they conspired against him to put him to death.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּאמְר֖וּ אִ֣ישׁ אֶל אָחִ֑י/ו הִנֵּ֗ה בַּ֛עַל הַ/חֲלֹמ֥וֹת הַלָּזֶ֖ה בָּֽא
verses.en: And they said, a man to his brother: "Behold, this master of dreams comes!

verses.he: וְ/עַתָּ֣ה לְכ֣וּ וְ/נַֽהַרְגֵ֗/הוּ וְ/נַשְׁלִכֵ֨/הוּ֙ בְּ/אַחַ֣ד הַ/בֹּר֔וֹת וְ/אָמַ֕רְנוּ חַיָּ֥ה רָעָ֖ה אֲכָלָ֑תְ/הוּ וְ/נִרְאֶ֕ה מַה יִּהְי֖וּ חֲלֹמֹתָֽי/ו
verses.en: And now, come, let us slay him and cast him into one of the pits, and we will say: 'An evil beast devoured him.' And we shall see what will become of his dreams."

verses.he: וַ/יִּשְׁמַ֣ע רְאוּבֵ֔ן וַ/יַּצִּלֵ֖/הוּ מִ/יָּדָ֑/ם וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר לֹ֥א נַכֶּ֖/נּוּ נָֽפֶשׁ
verses.en: And Re'uven heard, and he delivered him from their hand; and he said: "Let us not strike his breath-of-life."

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר אֲלֵ/הֶ֣ם רְאוּבֵן֮ אַל תִּשְׁפְּכוּ דָם֒ הַשְׁלִ֣יכוּ אֹת֗/וֹ אֶל הַ/בּ֤וֹר הַ/זֶּה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּ/מִּדְבָּ֔ר וְ/יָ֖ד אַל תִּשְׁלְחוּ ב֑/וֹ לְמַ֗עַן הַצִּ֤יל אֹת/וֹ֙ מִ/יָּדָ֔/ם לַ/הֲשִׁיב֖/וֹ אֶל אָבִֽי/ו
verses.en: And Re'uven said to them: "Do not shed blood. Cast him into this pit that is in the wilderness, but lay no hand upon him" — in order to deliver him from their hand, to return him to his father.

verses.he: וַֽ/יְהִ֕י כַּֽ/אֲשֶׁר בָּ֥א יוֹסֵ֖ף אֶל אֶחָ֑י/ו וַ/יַּפְשִׁ֤יטוּ אֶת יוֹסֵף֙ אֶת כֻּתָּנְתּ֔/וֹ אֶת כְּתֹ֥נֶת הַ/פַּסִּ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָלָֽי/ו
verses.en: And it was, when Yoseph came to his brothers, that they stripped Yoseph of his tunic, the tunic of extremities that was upon him.

verses.he: וַ/יִּ֨קָּחֻ֔/הוּ וַ/יַּשְׁלִ֥כוּ אֹת֖/וֹ הַ/בֹּ֑רָ/ה וְ/הַ/בּ֣וֹר רֵ֔ק אֵ֥ין בּ֖/וֹ מָֽיִם
verses.en: And they took him and cast him into the pit; and the pit was empty — there was no water in it.

verses.he: וַ/יֵּשְׁבוּ֮ לֶֽ/אֱכָל לֶחֶם֒ וַ/יִּשְׂא֤וּ עֵֽינֵי/הֶם֙ וַ/יִּרְא֔וּ וְ/הִנֵּה֙ אֹרְחַ֣ת יִשְׁמְעֵאלִ֔ים בָּאָ֖ה מִ/גִּלְעָ֑ד וּ/גְמַלֵּי/הֶ֣ם נֹֽשְׂאִ֗ים נְכֹאת֙ וּ/צְרִ֣י וָ/לֹ֔ט הוֹלְכִ֖ים לְ/הוֹרִ֥יד מִצְרָֽיְמָ/ה
verses.en: And they sat down to eat bread; and they lifted up their eyes and saw, and behold, a caravan of Yishme'elites coming from Gil'ad, and their camels bearing spices and balm and resin, going down to Mitsrayim.

verses.he: וַ/יֹּ֥אמֶר יְהוּדָ֖ה אֶל אֶחָ֑י/ו מַה בֶּ֗צַע כִּ֤י נַהֲרֹג֙ אֶת אָחִ֔י/נוּ וְ/כִסִּ֖ינוּ אֶת דָּמֽ/וֹ
verses.en: And Yehudah said to his brothers: "What gain is there if we slay our brother and cover over his blood?

verses.he: לְכ֞וּ וְ/נִמְכְּרֶ֣/נּוּ לַ/יִּשְׁמְעֵאלִ֗ים וְ/יָדֵ֨/נוּ֙ אַל תְּהִי ב֔/וֹ כִּֽי אָחִ֥י/נוּ בְשָׂרֵ֖/נוּ ה֑וּא וַֽ/יִּשְׁמְע֖וּ אֶחָֽי/ו
verses.en: Come, let us sell him to the Yishme'elites, and let our hand not be upon him; for he is our brother, our flesh." And his brothers hearkened.

verses.he: וַ/יַּֽעַבְרוּ֩ אֲנָשִׁ֨ים מִדְיָנִ֜ים סֹֽחֲרִ֗ים וַֽ/יִּמְשְׁכוּ֙ וַ/יַּֽעֲל֤וּ אֶת יוֹסֵף֙ מִן הַ/בּ֔וֹר וַ/יִּמְכְּר֧וּ אֶת יוֹסֵ֛ף לַ/יִּשְׁמְעֵאלִ֖ים בְּ/עֶשְׂרִ֣ים כָּ֑סֶף וַ/יָּבִ֥יאוּ אֶת יוֹסֵ֖ף מִצְרָֽיְמָ/ה
verses.en: And Midyanite men, traders, passed by; and they drew up and raised Yoseph from the pit, and sold Yoseph to the Yishme'elites for twenty pieces of silver; and they brought Yoseph to Mitsrayim.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֤שָׁב רְאוּבֵן֙ אֶל הַ/בּ֔וֹר וְ/הִנֵּ֥ה אֵין יוֹסֵ֖ף בַּ/בּ֑וֹר וַ/יִּקְרַ֖ע אֶת בְּגָדָֽי/ו
verses.en: And Re'uven returned to the pit, and behold, Yoseph was not in the pit; and he tore his garments.

verses.he: וַ/יָּ֥שָׁב אֶל אֶחָ֖י/ו וַ/יֹּאמַ֑ר הַ/יֶּ֣לֶד אֵינֶ֔/נּוּ וַ/אֲנִ֖י אָ֥נָה אֲנִי בָֽא
verses.en: And he returned to his brothers, and said: "The boy is gone! And I — where shall I go?"

verses.he: וַ/יִּקְח֖וּ אֶת כְּתֹ֣נֶת יוֹסֵ֑ף וַֽ/יִּשְׁחֲטוּ֙ שְׂעִ֣יר עִזִּ֔ים וַ/יִּטְבְּל֥וּ אֶת הַ/כֻּתֹּ֖נֶת בַּ/דָּֽם
verses.en: And they took the tunic of Yoseph, and slaughtered a he-goat, and dipped the tunic in the blood.

verses.he: וַֽ/יְשַׁלְּח֞וּ אֶת כְּתֹ֣נֶת הַ/פַּסִּ֗ים וַ/יָּבִ֨יאוּ֙ אֶל אֲבִי/הֶ֔ם וַ/יֹּאמְר֖וּ זֹ֣את מָצָ֑אנוּ הַכֶּר נָ֗א הַ/כְּתֹ֧נֶת בִּנְ/ךָ֛ הִ֖וא אִם לֹֽא
verses.en: And they sent the tunic of extremities, and brought it to their father, and said: "This we have found. Recognize, I pray: is it the tunic of your son, or not?"

verses.he: וַ/יַּכִּירָ֤/הּ וַ/יֹּ֨אמֶר֙ כְּתֹ֣נֶת בְּנִ֔/י חַיָּ֥ה רָעָ֖ה אֲכָלָ֑תְ/הוּ טָרֹ֥ף טֹרַ֖ף יוֹסֵֽף
verses.en: And he recognized it, and said: "The tunic of my son! An evil beast has devoured him! Torn, yes, torn is Yoseph!"

verses.he: וַ/יִּקְרַ֤ע יַעֲקֹב֙ שִׂמְלֹתָ֔י/ו וַ/יָּ֥שֶׂם שַׂ֖ק בְּ/מָתְנָ֑י/ו וַ/יִּתְאַבֵּ֥ל עַל בְּנ֖/וֹ יָמִ֥ים רַבִּֽים
verses.en: And Yaakov tore his garments, and put sackcloth upon his loins, and mourned for his son many days.

verses.he: וַ/יָּקֻמוּ֩ כָל בָּנָ֨י/ו וְ/כָל בְּנֹתָ֜י/ו לְ/נַחֲמ֗/וֹ וַ/יְמָאֵן֙ לְ/הִתְנַחֵ֔ם וַ/יֹּ֕אמֶר כִּֽי אֵרֵ֧ד אֶל בְּנִ֛/י אָבֵ֖ל שְׁאֹ֑לָ/ה וַ/יֵּ֥בְךְּ אֹת֖/וֹ אָבִֽי/ו
verses.en: And all his sons and all his daughters arose to comfort him, but he refused to be comforted, and said: "For I will go down to my son mourning, to the Pit." And his father wept for him.

verses.he: וְ/הַ֨/מְּדָנִ֔ים מָכְר֥וּ אֹת֖/וֹ אֶל מִצְרָ֑יִם לְ/פֽוֹטִיפַר֙ סְרִ֣יס פַּרְעֹ֔ה שַׂ֖ר הַ/טַּבָּחִֽים
verses.en: And the Medanites sold him to Mitsrayim, to Potifar, a courtier of Par'oh, chief of the slaughterers.
